title: מלחימה SMT תחת מיקרוסקופ
description: דרוש/ה מלחימ/ת על חלל למחלקת החלל של תעשייה ביטחונית מובילה! הזדמנות נדירה להשתלב בעשייה פורצת דרך בתחום החלל והטכנולוגיה הביטחונית! מיקום: אזור מרכז עבודה בחדר נקי בתנאים מעולים! -ניסיון של לפחות 5 שנים בהלחמת רכיבים אלקטרוניים – חובה -ניסיון בהלחמות SMT – חובה -ניסיון בהלחמות תחת מיקרוסקופ – חובה -נכונות לעבור קורס איכות ולקבל הסמכה לתקן חלל ESA -זמינות לשעות נוספות, עבודה במשמרות וניידות עם רכב – חובה מה תקבלו אצלנו?-תנאים סוציאליים מלאים -ארוחות מסובסדות -קרן השתלמות -הטבות מגוונות לעובדים -סביבת עבודה מתקדמת ומקצועית

title: מנהל/ת מכירות לפתרונות חנייה
description: הצטרפו לחברה עם עוצמה ותהנו מהזדמנויות לצמיחה ולפיתוח מקצועי! קבוצת אלקטרה מגייסת מנהל/ת מכירות לפתרונות חנייה תיאור התפקיד : • ניהול והובלת תהליכי מכירה של מתקני חניה ללקוחות עסקיים • איתור ופיתוח הזדמנויות עסקיות (יזמים, קבלנים, אדריכלים, מנה"פ, יועצים, חברות נדלן, חברות ניהול וכו’) • ניהול מו״מ וסגירת עסקאות • עבודה מול לקוחות לאורך כל שלבי הפרויקט – משלב התכנון אל שלב ההצעה ועד סגירה ליווי בתכנון והטמעה של מתקני החניה בתוכניות הלקוח • הכנת הצעות מחיר והצעות טכניות בשיתוף גורמים מקצועיים • עבודה מול ממשקים פנים ארגוניים (הנדסה, תפעול, ביצוע) • ניהול קשרים ארוכי טווח עם לקוחות • עמידה ביעדי מכירות והגדלת היקף הפעילות מדובר במכירה פרויקטלית הכוללת תהליך ארוך ומורכב, עם השפעה ישירה על תוצאות העסק. ימים ושעות העבודה: א'-ה' בין השעות 17:00+ 08:00 + נכונות לשעות נוספות המשרדים בראשל"צ. יתרון: • תשתיות / מערכות טכניות/ מערכות אלקטרומכאניות/ בקרה מה אנחנו מציעים : •תפקיד עם עצמאות והשפעה עסקית • עבודה מול לקוחות גדולים ופרויקטים משמעותיים • סביבת עבודה דינמית ומאתגרת • אפשרויות קידום והתפתחות • תנאים טובים + רכב ניסיון במכירות שטח / מכירות פרויקטליות בתחום הנדל"ן– חובה רישיון נהיגה – חובה אנגלית ברמה טובה ניסיון בעבודה מול לקוחות עסקיים יכולת ניהול מו״מ וסגירת עסקאות

title: Technical Account Manager, Google Cloud Consulting (English, Hebrew)
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in a customer-facing role working with stakeholders, driving customer technical implementations or transformation programs.
* Experience supporting customers in cloud operations (e.g., launch or capacity planning, product release management), technical support, escalation management, or IT consulting.
* Ability to communicate in English and Hebrew fluently to support client relationship management in this region.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* MBA or Master’s degree in a Management, Technical, or Engineering field.
* Experience translating business requirements into technological solutions.
* Experience in application or workload migration to public cloud providers.
* Experience collaborating with teams, groups, business units, channel partners, systems integrators, and third-party developers to deliver solutions.
* Understanding of IT operations, database systems, networking, IT security, application development, service architecture, cloud-native application development, hosted services, storage systems, or content delivery networks.
* Excellent written and verbal communication, presentation, problem-solving, and client management skills.

**About the job**
-----------------

Our Google Cloud Consulting organization within Google Cloud delivers product and implementation expertise to our strategic customers to help them get the most out of their Google Cloud investments.

As a Technical Account Manager (TAM), you will draw on our customer-facing skills and technical acumen to help customers successfully adopt Google Cloud products. Your previous experience with cloud infrastructure, program management, enterprise technology implementation, strategy development and customer advocacy will play a critical part in your day to day work driving success at our most critical customers. You will lead the successful adoption of Google Cloud at leading organizations, guiding them through the strategic and technical facets of their Cloud transformation journey.

In this role, you will drive customer adoption of Google Cloud services, like Google Compute Engine, Vertex AI, Google Kubernetes Engine, BigQuery, and many more. You will regularly engage with different stakeholder groups, including executives of large enterprises and a cross-functional and geographically dispersed team. You will utilize their relationship management skills and technical credibility to effectively communicate at all levels of the organization, establishing themselves as a trusted advisor. Travel (domestically and internationally) up to approximately 20% of the time.

Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Accelerate customer adoption of Google Cloud by leading the implementation journey. Provide technical guidance and manage timelines, milestones, migration goal and business transformation strategies.
* Advocate for customer needs in order to overcome adoption blockers and drive new feature development. Lead across multiple work streams and teams to maintain customer momentum.
* Develop strategic relationships with key stakeholders (particularly C-Suite and IT team) to understand a customer’s business and develop strategic roadmaps. Lead quarterly business reviews and executive sessions to better understand business and technical needs.
* Plan for customer events and launches, partnering with Support, Engineering and SRE to ensure customer success during critical moments. Work with customers and Support to guide issues and escalations to resolution.
* Develop best practices and assets based on learnings from customer engagements to help support initiatives to scale through partners.

Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: מיישם/ת פיננסי/ת במערכת NetSuite
description:
גוש דן

**אנחנו מחפשים מיישם/ת פיננסי/ת מנוסה להשתלבות בצוות NetSuite שלנו ולהובלת פרויקטים מקצה לקצה בסביבה דינמית ומאתגרת !**
  
  
**במסגרת התפקיד :**
  
**-** הובלת פרויקטי יישום NetSuite בתחום הפיננסי (E2E) משלב האפיון ועד העלייה לאוויר
  

* עבודה שוטפת מול מנהלי כספים, חשבים ובעלי עניין בצד הלקוח
* אפיון צרכים עסקיים ותרגומם לפתרונות מערכתיים
* יישום המודולים פיננסיים GL, AR, AP, Fixed Assets, Revenue Recognition ועוד
* שיפור ואופטימיזציה של תהליכים פיננסיים אצל לקוחות
* עבודה מול צוותי פיתוח ואינטגרציה
* ליווי ותמיכה לאחר עלייה לאוויר

  
**דרישות :**
  
- רו"ח מוסמך/ת (CPA) - חובה
  
- לפחות של לפחות 3 שנים ביישום מודולים פיננסיים במערכת NetSuite בחברת יישום / שותף NetSuite - חובה
  
- ניסיון בהובלת פרויקטים גלובליים ועבודה מול לקוחות בינלאומיים - חבה
  
- הבנה מעמיקה בתהליכים פיננסיים (דיווחים כספיים, הנה"ח, סגירות וכו') - חובה
  
- אנגלית ברמה גבוהה (דיבור, כתיבה וקריאה) - חובה

title: מתאמ.ת שירות ירושלים

title: Data engineer למשרד ממשלתי בירושלים
description:
חברת Software AG מגייסת Data engineer למשרד ממשלתי בירושלים. המשרה כוללת תכנון והובלת הארכיטקטורה הכוללת של פתרונות הדאטה וה-BI בארגון, לרבות הקמת DWH, הגדרת מודלי נתונים וזרימות מידע, ותמיכה בפיתוח פתרונות BI ודשבורדים בסביבה היברידית- On-prem ובענן AWS. 5 שנות ניסיון כ-Data engineer. ניסיון בתכנון ארכיטקטורת Data ו-BI, כולל תכנון והקמה של מחסני נתונים (DWH) והגדרת מודלי נתונים (Dimensional Modeling).
  
  
ניסיון בתכנון זרימות נתונים ותהליכי ETL / ELT עבור בסיסי נתונים גדולים ומורכבים. ניסיון בפיתוח Hands-On של פתרונות Data / BI מקצה לקצה. ניסיון בהגדרת סטנדרטים לפיתוח, ניהול נתונים ומתודולוגיות עבודה בתחום ה-Data. ניסיון בעבודה עם כלי BI, בדגש על Tableau, בשיתוף פעולה עם צוותי פיתוח וגורמים עסקיים.
  
  
השכלה רלוונטית בתחום.

title: סוחר/מנהל השקעות מניות חו"ל
description:

title: Workforce Strategy & Planning Manager
description:
**About Payoneer**

Founded in 2005, Payoneer is the global financial platform that removes friction from doing business across borders, with a mission to connect the world's underserved businesses to a rising global economy. We're a community with over 2,500 colleagues all over the world, working to serve customers, and partners in over 190 countries and territories.

By taking the complexity out of the financial workflows–including everything from global payments and compliance to multi-currency and workforce management, to providing working capital and business intelligence–we give businesses the tools they need to work efficiently worldwide and grow with confidence.

Our Workforce Strategy team drives alignment between business priorities and talent strategy, ensuring a healthy, future-ready workforce. We combine strategic workforce planning, organizational insights, talent intelligence, and workforce analytics to shape how the company attracts, develops, and retains talent globally.

We are seeking a **Workforce Strategy & Planning** **Manager** to lead enterprise-wide initiatives that align workforce composition with business goals and long-term growth strategy. This role partners closely with HR, Finance, FP&A, and business leadership to define workforce targets, optimize organizational design, and build scalable planning processes that improve agility, efficiency, and business performance.

This **is a highly strategic**, cross-functional position for someone who thrives at the intersection of strategy, analytics, and execution and enjoys solving complex business problems through people and organizational decisions.

What you'll do:

**Workforce Strategy & Planning:**

* Lead enterprise-wide workforce strategy initiatives across organizational structure, location strategy, spans and layers, workforce mix, engagement models, and critical skill planning.
* Define annual workforce composition targets and governance mechanisms; monitor progress, identify risks, and drive action plans to ensure execution.
* Partner directly with senior executives, HR, and Finance to shape workforce investment decisions and align talent strategy with business priorities.
* Build scalable workforce planning processes, operating cadences, and executive dashboards to improve visibility, accountability, and decision-making.
* Connect workforce insights to financial outcomes by partnering closely with FP&A on labor cost, productivity, capacity planning, and long-term workforce investments.
* Identify opportunities to improve organizational efficiency, agility, and scalability through workforce design, talent allocation, and strategic capability planning.
* Provide thought leadership on future of work trends, skills-based planning, and organizational transformation.

**Talent Intelligence, Analytics & AI Enablement:**

* Lead the development of talent intelligence and external benchmarking capabilities, providing market insights to support location strategy, hiring priorities, and organizational design.
* Leverage AI tools and automation solutions to improve workforce analytics, research, and decision support processes, including dashboard development, automated data analysis, and market intelligence generation.
* Identify opportunities to use AI-driven workflows to simplify reporting, improve planning accuracy, and increase strategic visibility across the People function.
* Partner with HR and business leaders to translate complex workforce data into clear, actionable recommendations for executive decision-making.

Who you are:

* 4–5 years of experience in strategy consulting, workforce strategy, business operations, FP&A, HR strategy, or organizational transformation roles in global or high-growth environments.
* Strong analytical and financial acumen, with the ability to translate workforce data into strategic business decisions and executive recommendations.
* Experience leading workforce planning, organizational design, or enterprise transformation initiatives with measurable business impact.
* Hands-on experience using AI tools, automation platforms, and modern analytics solutions to improve reporting, dashboards, research, and strategic decision-making.
* Comfortable working with data visualization tools (such as Tableau, Power BI, Looker, or similar) and leveraging automation/AI tools to improve efficiency and insight generation.
* Exceptional stakeholder management skills with proven ability to influence senior leaders across functions.
* Strong executive communication and storytelling skills, with experience presenting to leadership audiences.
* Hands-on and execution-oriented, able to move seamlessly between strategic thinking and operational delivery.
* Strong curiosity, business judgment, and comfort operating in ambiguity with a builder mindset.
* Bachelor's degree required; MBA, Master's, or equivalent advanced degree preferred.

  

#LI-AG2

**The Payoneer Ways of Working**

**Act as our customer's partner on the inside**
  
*Learning what they need and creating what will help them go further.*

**Do it. Own it.**
  
*Being fearlessly accountable in everything we do.*

**Continuously improve**
  
*Always striving for a higher standard than our last.*

**Build each other up**  
*Helping each other grow, as professionals and people.*

If this sounds like a business, a community, and a mission you want to be part of, apply today.

*We are committed to providing a diverse and inclusive workplace. Payoneer is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment no matter your race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. If you require reasonable accommodation at any stage of the hiring process, please speak to the recruiter managing the role for any adjustments. Decisions about requests for reasonable accommodation are made on a case-by-case basis.*

title: Senior Salesforce Admin & Release Manager
description: לארגון ממשלתי גדול ומוביל טכנולוגית בירושלים דרוש/ה Senior Salesforce Admin & Release Manager עבודה במודל היברידית! תיאור התפקיד: איש/אשת Salesforce מנוסה ובעל/ת ראייה טכנולוגית רחבה להובלת תהליכי יישום וניהול מערכת מתקדמים. התפקיד מגוון ומשלב ניהול שוטף של המערכת (System Administration) בארגון מורכב, לצד אחריות מקצה לקצה על תהליכי שחרור גרסאות וניהול סביבות (CI/CD & Release Management), אבטחת מידע ומודל הרשאות, וביצוע בקרת איכות וסקירות קוד (Code Review) לצוות הפיתוח. תחומי אחריות מרכזיים: אחריות מלאה על מודל השיתוף וההרשאות בארגון – ניהול משתמשים, פרופילים, Permission Sets, Role Hierarchy ו-Sharing Rules. ניטור שוטף של המערכת וביצוע Troubleshooting למשתמשי הקצה. הובלה ואחריות על תהליכי CI/CD, ניהול סביבות הפיתוח (Sandboxes) ותכנון העברות קוד ויישומים בין סביבות (Deployments). ביצוע סקירות קוד וארכיטקטורה לפיתוחים חדשים של הצוות, לרבות אוטומציות מורכבות (Flows) ורכיבי קוד (Apex, LWC), להבטחת עמידה ב-Best Practices של Salesforce טרם עליה לייצור. תרגום צרכים עסקיים לפתרונות טכנולוגיים, יצירת אובייקטים, שדות מותאמים, Record Types, Layouts, ואוטומציות מתקדמות. הקמה ותחזוקה של דוחות ודשבורדים (Dashboards) מורכבים, טיוב נתונים וביצוע פעולות ייבוא/ייצוא באמצעות Data Loader וכלים מקבילים. דרישות: ניסיון של 5 שנים לפחות כמיישם/ת Salesforce. ניסיון של שנתיים לפחות כמנהל/ת מערכת (Salesforce Admin) בארגון מורכב. תעודת הסמכה Salesforce Certified Administrator (חובה - יש לצרף למועמדות). ניסיון מוכח וראייה טכנית לביצוע Code Review וסקירת ארכיטקטורת יישום/פיתוח. היכרות מעמיקה וניסיון מעשי בהובלת תהליכי CI/CD, Sandboxes ו-Release Management בסיילספורס.

title: Global Talent Acquisition Team Lead
description:
Exodigo is the leading underground mapping solution for non-intrusive discovery. Our platforms combine multi-sensor fusion, 3D imaging, and AI technologies to create complete, accurate underground maps that enable confident decision-making for customers across the built world. We transform the project lifecycle for our customers, who include key community stakeholders in the utilities, transportation, and government sectors.

**We are experiencing sky-rocketing growth and closed a historically large $96M Series B round in July of 2025.**

  
  
Requirements:
  

* 2+ years of experience managing, mentoring, and leading a recruitment team (recruiters and sourcers) in a fast-paced environment.
* 5+ years of full-lifecycle recruiting experience within global, high-growth technology companies or startups.
* Proven experience recruiting across international markets, with a strong focus on the US and Israel talent landscapes (Tech and Non-Tech roles).

**Skills & Mindset**

* **Data-Driven Approach:** Deep analytical skills with a proven ability to build dashboards, interpret recruitment metrics, and use data to solve pipeline bottlenecks and guide leadership decisions.
* **Advanced Sourcing:** Expert-level knowledge of modern sourcing tools, AI recruitment software, LinkedIn Recruiter, and creative outbound strategies.
* **Communication & Collaboration:** Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to partner closely with senior executives and hiring managers across multiple time zones.
* **Adaptability:** A thrives-in-chaos mindset—comfortable with shifting priorities, aggressive scaling goals, and dynamic business needs.

  
Job description:
  

* Direct, mentor, and manae a high-performing team of 4 recruiters, fostering accountability and continuous professional growth.
* Oversee the team’s execution to ensure alignment with high growth company hiring goals while maintaining a high-quality candidate pipeline.
* Design and execute innovative sourcing initiatives to build strong, diverse talent pipelines across highly competitive global markets.
* Identify and leverage the most effective sourcing channels, talent communities, and outreach approaches—utilizing data, market insights, referrals, social media, AI tools, and creative engagement methods.
* Use advanced talent analytics to track, measure, and optimize every stage of the recruitment lifecycle.
* Proactively monitor key metrics to identify bottlenecks and implement scalable solutions based on data insights.
* Create, maintain, and enhance comprehensive recruiting dashboards and reports for leadership and cross-functional stakeholders.
* Provide clear visibility into core metrics including hiring progress, funnel performance, team productivity, candidate experience, and macro recruitment trends.

**Ensure Excellent Candidate Experience:**

* **Journey Mapping:** Foster a positive, transparent, and engaging recruitment journey from the very first point of contact through to the final hiring decision.
* **Feedback Loops:** Continuously measure, evaluate, and improve the candidate experience using structured feedback and data insights.

  
Learn more:  
  

https://www.exodigo.com

https://www.youtube.com/@exodigo2321

title: Sr. Talent Acquisition Partner
description:
**Standort** Kfar Saba, Israel **Art der Arbeit** Vollzeit **Arbeitsform** Hybrid **Job level** Berufserfahrene **Job ID** 5778922003 **Unternehmen** ERGO NEXT **Anstellungsart** Unbefristet **Fachbereich** Personalwesen

Job speichern

Jetzt bewerben

  

**Location: Kfar Sava, IL (hybrid)**

ERGO NEXT's mission is to help entrepreneurs thrive. We’re doing that by building the only technology-led, full-stack provider of small business insurance in the industry, taking on the entire value chain and transforming the customer experience.

Simply put, wherever you find small businesses, you’ll find ERGO NEXT.

Since 2016, we’ve helped hundreds of thousands of small business customers across the United States get fast, customized and affordable coverage. We’re backed by industry leaders in insurance and tech, and we still have room to grow — that’s where you come in.

We are looking for a Senior Talent Acquisition Partner to lead recruiting efforts for our Israel site and serve as a trusted advisor to hiring managers and business leaders. This role combines hands-on recruiting execution with strategic partnership, market expertise, and the ability to solve complex hiring challenges.  
You will own the full hiring lifecycle for a variety of technical, business, and specialized roles while partnering closely with leaders across the organization to attract and hire exceptional talent.

**What You’ll Do:**

* Own and drive full-cycle recruiting across technical, business, and specialized functions, from workforce planning and intake through offer negotiation and close.
* Develop and execute targeted sourcing strategies to identify, engage, and attract high-caliber talent in competitive and evolving markets.
* Build and maintain strong talent pipelines through proactive sourcing, market mapping, networking, and relationship-building activities.
* Serve as a strategic talent advisor to hiring managers and business leaders, providing guidance on talent availability, market dynamics, role design, compensation considerations, and hiring strategy.
* Conduct HR interviews and provide comprehensive candidate assessments to support effective hiring decisions.
* Partner with hiring teams to design effective assessment processes, calibrate interview feedback, and ensure high-quality hiring decisions.
* Leverage recruiting metrics, funnel analytics, and market insights to identify bottlenecks, improve conversion rates, and optimize hiring outcomes.
* Drive a best-in-class candidate experience while maintaining a high bar for quality, fairness, and consistency throughout the hiring process.
* Collaborate closely with People Partners, Compensation, Finance, and global Talent Acquisition colleagues to deliver business-critical hiring outcomes.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of recruiting practices, interviewer effectiveness, sourcing capabilities, and talent acquisition operations across the organization

**What We Need:**

* 7+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, ideally within technology companies or global organizations.
* Strong knowledge of the Israeli talent market and hiring landscape.
* Proven experience recruiting for complex and hard-to-fill technical and business roles.
* Ability to influence stakeholders and provide thoughtful guidance on hiring decisions.
* Strong interviewing, candidate assessment, and relationship-building skills.
* Experience using recruiting data and market insights to drive decision-making.
* Excellent communication skills in both Hebrew and English.
* High ownership, strong judgment, and the ability to work independently while collaborating effectively across teams.

***Note on Fraudulent Recruiting***

*We have become aware that there may be fraudulent recruiting attempts being made by people posing as representatives of ERGO NEXT Insurance. These scams may involve fake job postings, unsolicited emails, or messages claiming to be from our recruiters or hiring managers.*  
  
*Please note, we do not ask for sensitive information via chat, text, or social media, and any email communications will come from the domain @next-insurance.com or @**nextinsurance.com**. Additionally, Next Insurance will never ask for payment, fees, or purchases to be made by a job applicant. All applicants are encouraged to apply directly to our open jobs via the careers page on our website. Interviews are generally conducted via Zoom video conference unless the candidate requests other accommodations.*  
  
*If you believe that you have been the target of an interview/offer scam by someone posing as a representative of Next Insurance, please do not provide any personal or financial information. You can find additional information about this type of scam and report any fraudulent employment offers via the Federal Trade Commission's website (**https://consumer.ftc.gov/articles/job-scams**), or you can contact your local law enforcement agency.*

title: DevOps Automation & Release Engineering Specialist
description:
**תיאור התפקיד:**  
אחריות על תפעול, תחזוקה וניהול שוטף של סביבת Azure ו-AKS.
  
ניטור, טיפול בתקלות, ניתוח כשלים והבטחת זמינות גבוהה של מערכות קריטיות.
  
בנייה, שיפור ותחזוקה של תהליכי CI/CD באמצעות Azure DevOps.
  
פיתוח ותחזוקת YAML Pipelines, תבניות אוטומציה וסטנדרטים ארגוניים.
  
הובלת תהליכי Release Management מקצה לקצה, כולל אישורים, Rollout, Rollback ובקרות פרודקשן.
  
אוטומציה של תהליכי Deployment לסביבות Kubernetes ו-AKS.
  
ניהול והרשאות בסביבת Azure DevOps, כולל Repositories, Pipelines, Environments, Service Connections ו-Approval Flows.
  
שילוב פתרונות אבטחה בתהליכי הפיתוח וההפצה, כולל Key Vault, Secrets, Certificates וניהול גישה מאובטח.
  
הובלת תהליכי Governance, גיבוש נהלים, סטנדרטים ומתודולוגיות עבודה.
  
פיתוח כלי Self-Service ותבניות עבודה עבור צוותי הפיתוח.
  
כתיבת תיעוד טכני, Runbooks, נהלי תפעול, מדריכי Onboarding ונהלי Recovery.
  
עבודה שוטפת מול צוותי פיתוח, QA, תשתיות, אבטחת מידע, ענן ותפעול.
  
  
**דרישות התפקיד:**  
ניסיון משמעותי Hands-On בתפקיד DevOps / Cloud Infrastructure Engineer.
  
ניסיון מעשי מוכח בעבודה עם Azure DevOps בארגונים גדולים.
  
ניסיון בבנייה ותחזוקה של YAML Pipelines.
  
ניסיון בהקמה וניהול של תהליכי CI/CD בסביבות DEV, TEST, QA ו-PROD.
  
ניסיון מעשי בעבודה עם AKS / Kubernetes ובאוטומציית Deployments.
  
ניסיון בניהול תהליכי Release Engineering ו-Deployment Governance.
  
ניסיון בניהול Artifacts, Versioning, Packaging ו-Promotion Processes.
  
ניסיון בהטמעת Key Vault, Secrets, Certificates ופתרונות גישה מאובטחת.
  
ניסיון בכתיבת סקריפטים ואוטומציה באמצעות PowerShell, Bash, Python, Node.js או טכנולוגיות דומות.
  
ניסיון בעבודה עם Git, Branching Strategies, Pull Requests ו-Code Reviews.
  
ניסיון בניהול הרשאות, Service Connections ואבטחת Pipelines ב-Azure DevOps.
  
ניסיון בעבודה עם Infrastructure as Code, בדגש על Terraform.
  
יכולת Troubleshooting גבוהה וביצוע Root Cause Analysis לתקלות CI/CD ו-Production.
  
ניסיון בגיבוש נהלים, סטנדרטים ותהליכי עבודה ארגוניים.
  
יכולת עבודה עצמאית, הובלה מקצועית וראייה מערכתית רחבה.

title: Research Manager, Agentic AI Security Research
description:
### **General Information**

Req #

100017170

Career area:

Research/Development

Country/Region:

Israel

State:

Tel Aviv District

City:

Tel Aviv-Yafo

Date:

Thursday, June 11, 2026

**Additional Locations**:

* Israel

### **Why Work at Lenovo**

We are Lenovo. We do what we say. We own what we do. We WOW our customers.

  
  

Lenovo is a US$83 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked #196 in the Fortune Global 500, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world’s largest PC company with a full-stack portfolio of AI-enabled, AI-ready, and AI-optimized devices (PCs, workstations, smartphones, tablets), infrastructure (server, storage, edge, high performance computing and software defined infrastructure), software, solutions, and services. Lenovo’s continued investment in world-changing innovation is building a more equitable, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. Lenovo is listed on the Hong Kong stock exchange under Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992) (ADR: LNVGY).

  
  

To find out more visit www.lenovo.com and read about the latest news via our StoryHub.

### **Description and Requirements**

**Please note that the team has moved to a new location. The office is now at 121 Menachem Begin Road, Tel Aviv, 61st floor, in the POINT office complex. As per our office policy, you will be required to visit the site at least three times a week.**

Lenovo Digital Trust Lab is looking for a Research Manager to lead a team building AI-powered security agents. You will own the team's mission end-to-end — from hiring and developing talent to setting the research agenda and shipping production-grade agents. This role sits at the intersection of security engineering and frontier AI, partnering closely with technical leadership across detection, AppSec, IR, and platform teams.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Build, develop, and retain a high-performing team of engineers and researchers; set clear goals, growth paths, and performance expectations
* Own the team's roadmap — translate organizational priorities into a focused research and engineering agenda with healthy delivery pace
* Partner with Staff and senior engineers on architectural and evaluation decisions that shape the agentic security platform
* Remove blockers, manage cross-team dependencies, and protect team focus and momentum
* Define and uphold standards for research rigor — evaluation discipline, safety, reliability, and reproducibility across all shipped agents
* Collaborate with detection, AppSec, IR, and platform leadership to identify high-leverage opportunities and align on priorities
* Represent the team to senior leadership — communicate strategy, progress, risks, and resourcing needs with clarity
* Track frontier model releases and emerging techniques; translate relevant developments into concrete team bets
  

  

**Requirements**

* BSc in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience; advanced degree (MSc/PhD) in CS, Cybersecurity, or a related field is an advantage
* 4+ years managing engineers or researchers, or extensive tech-lead experience with demonstrated readiness to step into people management
* 4+ years of software development experience with a track record of delivering production systems or research outcomes in a team setting
* Solid security engineering foundations: vulnerability research, exploitation techniques across web apps/APIs/enterprise systems, threat modeling, and security best practices across cloud, on-prem, and SaaS environments
* Working knowledge of autonomous AI agents — planning, tool use, multi-step reasoning, error recovery — and how they operate in production; familiarity with orchestration frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, or custom planners)
* Hands-on experience with prompting, RAG, context engineering, and the agentic tooling ecosystem (MCP, memory systems, skills)
* Experience designing evaluations for non-deterministic systems — benchmarks, regression suites, observability — and treating evals as a first-class engineering discipline
* Strong communication in English (written and verbal), with the ability to set direction and drive alignment across technical and non-technical stakeholders

**What We Offer:**

* Health & Disability Insurance
* Pension/ Retirement Plan
* Meal Vouchers
* Employee Referral Bonus
* Children of Lenovo Employees Scholarship Program
* Lenovo and Motorola Product Discounts
* Employee Assistance Program, e.g., for health, legal & financial consultancy
* Internal E-learning Development Platform Available for Employees

*We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class.*

**Additional Locations**:

* Israel

* Israel

**AI PROCESSING NOTICE**

We use AI-based tools to support some of our processes (e.g. online interviews recordings and transcripts) in order to achieve better efficiency, accuracy and for our documentation purposes. AI can make mistakes, but we always make sure that the outputs are manually reviewed by a human. You can always opt-out or contact us in case of any question.

title: Data Scientist - Network Intelligence
description:
About Webbing

Webbing is a global connectivity provider delivering cellular and IoT data services across 190+ countries. Our infrastructure generates massive volumes of network signaling, session, and performance data — and we use that data to make smarter routing, pricing, and better customer experience.

The Role

We're looking for a Data Scientist to turn our network data into a competitive advantage. You'll work directly with terabytes of telecom signaling, session, and usage data to build models that improve network selection, detect anomalies, optimize cost-per-gigabyte, and surface insights that shape product and commercial strategy. This is a high-impact role sitting at the intersection of ML, telecom engineering, and business decision-making.

What You'll Do

* Design and deploy machine learning models on network data — including network selection optimization, churn and usage prediction, fraud and anomaly detection, and QoS/QoE forecasting.
* Analyze CDRs, signaling events (Diameter, GTP, SIP), session logs, and radio-level metrics to identify performance issues, cost drivers, and growth opportunities.
* Partner with the Network Operations and Product teams to translate raw telemetry into actionable signals — e.g., which carrier to steer traffic to in a given country at a given hour.
* Build forecasting and segmentation models that inform pricing, capacity planning, and customer lifecycle strategy.
* Own analyses end-to-end: framing the business question, exploring the data, building the model, validating it, and communicating findings to both technical and executive audiences.
* Define and track KPIs for network quality, customer experience, and commercial performance, and build dashboards that make those metrics visible across the company.
* Mentor junior data scientists and analysts, and help raise the bar on data science practices, code quality, and experimentation rigor.

  
Requirements:  
  

**What We're Looking For**

* 5+ years of hands-on data science experience, ideally with exposure to telecom, networking, IoT, or large-scale event/log data.
* Strong applied ML background: classification, regression, time-series forecasting, anomaly detection, clustering, and a working understanding of when to use what.
* Expert SQL and strong Python (pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch, or TensorFlow). Comfort with big-data tooling such as AWS Lakehouse, Redshift, and others.
* Track record of shipping models into production and measuring their business impact, not just building notebooks.
* Strong analytical storytelling — you can take a noisy dataset and turn it into a clear narrative for a non-technical stakeholder.
* Telecom and networking concepts — cellular architecture (2G/3G/4G/5G), roaming, IMSI/IMEI, HLR/HSS, signaling protocols, QoS metrics. If you don't have this yet but have worked on similarly complex network/log data, we'd still like to talk.
* Excellent written and spoken English.

**Nice to Have**

* Familiarity with streaming data (Kafka, Flink) and real-time inference.
* Background in pricing, revenue management, or unit economics analysis.
* MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Statistics, EE, Physics, or a related quantitative field.

  
About Webbing:  
  

Webbing is a global connectivity provider offering services in the Internet of Things (IoT) and Enterprise Mobility space.

As an innovative mobile carrier, Webbing provides an unmatchable enterprise grade solution for Fortune 500 & IoT/M2M companies, as well as an embedded solution for various manufacturers across the globe, to ensure a secured and continuous internet connection for all devices, no matter where they are in the world.

  
What we offer:
  

* Hybrid work
* Work life balance
* Parking
* Medical insurance
* Food allowance
* Cellular plan
* Unlimited data plan for traveling
* Discount memberships
* Growth opportunities
* Professional development budget
* Global company- working and collaborating with amazing people around the world
* Fun working environment & company activities
* And of course, air hockey, pool table, and ping-pong tournaments!

title: Analytical Consultant, Apps and Gaming (English, Hebrew)
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in media analytics, advertising sales, digital media and marketing, consulting, or financial analysis.
* Ability to communicate in English and Hebrew fluently to engage with clients in the region.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience with online marketing campaign management, especially Google apps campaigns.
* Experience developing story lines and narratives from datasets/research.
* Knowledge of the apps and gaming ecosystem or experience working at a gaming company, an apps startup or a mobile measurement partner.
* Proficiency with spreadsheets and comfortable with processing large data sets as well as building complex models while working collaboratively with multiple internal stakeholders.
* Ability to be flexible, accustomed to ambiguous situations, learn in a fast-paced environment, and comfortable working as part of a team.

**About the job**
-----------------

Businesses of all shapes and sizes rely on Google’s unparalleled advertising solutions to help them grow in today's dynamic marketing environment. You bring a passion for sales, knowledge of online media, and commitment to maximize customer success. You act like an owner, move with velocity through change, finding innovative and strategic ways to consistently deliver extraordinary and incremental outcomes for both Google and your customers. You build trusted relationships with customers, uncovering their business needs and translating them into powerful solutions to achieve their most ambitious goals. You achieve as a team with sellers, shape the future of advertising in the AI-era, and make a real impact on the millions of companies and billions of users that trust Google with their most important goals.

Google's Large Customer Sales (LCS) teams are strategic partners and industry thought leaders to the world's leading brands and agencies. We continuously challenge how customers think about their business and how Google can support growth. We focus on helping these players navigate profound industry shifts and drive outsized business performance by competitively selling Google's full suite of advertising solutions across Search, YouTube, Measurement, and more. As a member of our LCS team, you'll have the unique opportunity to sell at the forefront of technology, collaborating with executives, influencing market-shaping strategies, and delivering tangible results that significantly impact major global businesses and drive the growth of Google.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Develop forward thinking, data-driven recommendations that align with client marketing objectives.
* Identify sound hypotheses and analyses to diagnose opportunities, perform analyses using various tools and data sources to support and/or refine these hypotheses.
* Use comprehensive knowledge of Google's products to align them with clients marketing objectives and advocate the wider strategic opportunities in relation to Google Ads (Apps, YouTube, Search and Display) and other solutions.
* Ensure implementation and optimization working with cross-functional teams so that client goals and timelines are achieved and exceeded.
* Build strong relationships with top international apps and gaming customers through deep knowledge of the industry, competitive landscapes, client products and key business issues that affect the client and industry.

Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Salesforce Consultant
description:
**About AllCloud**

AllCloud is a leader in amplifying organizations’ cloud potential through AI. With a track record of hundreds of successful migrations and implementations across AWS and Salesforce, AllCloud has developed strategies and solutions that enable businesses of all sizes to remain at the forefront of innovation.

AllCloud is a leader in AI-led professional and managed services. As an AWS Premier and audited managed services Partner, and Salesforce Consulting partner, AllCloud provides comprehensive AI-led cloud journey support, from initial migration to ongoing management through our Engage Managed Services. Our expertise ensures that clients remain aligned with ecosystem best practices while focusing on their core business growth.

AllCloud serves clients across the globe with offices in EMEA and North America. www.allcloud.io

**Job Summary**

AllCloud is looking for an experienced Salesforce Consultant to join our team of experts. The candidate will be responsible for understanding our customers’ business & implementation requirements and for migrating customers to Salesforce to support those requirements.

The Salesforce Consultant will be responsible for performing business analysis in order to support the following departments - Sales, Customer Service, Partner Management, and Operations teams.

**Summary of Key Responsibilities**

* Analyze customer business requirements and define future needs based on Salesforce best practices
* Configure the Salesforce application based on the customer's requirements
* Implementation and support activities for projects
* Allocate tasks including project timelines
* Deliver projects, using the most appropriate Salesforce tools and techniques
* Apply best practices to build the Salesforce applications
* Work with internal and external interfaces
* Implement business functionality
* Research Salesforce capabilities as needed to suit business requirements
* Perform Quality Assurance of customer projects

  
Requirements:
  

* 2+ years of experience in designing and implementing the Salesforce platform
* Experience in understanding the customer, writing full characterization documents
* High personal level, high level of service and technical capabilities
* Understanding of design patterns
* Problem solving and multitasking skills
* Creative and flexible attitude
* Excellent oral and written communication skills
* Team player

**﻿Advantages**

* Graduate of Industrial Engineering
* Salesforce Admin certification

*AllCloud is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, orientation, national origin, age, disability, genetics or any other basis forbidden under federal, provincial, or local law.*

title: מנהל/ת מוצר לאגף השיווק לארגון גדול בבית דגן
description:
**הגדרת תפקיד:** מנהל.ת מחלקת מוצרים – אגף השיווק אגף: שיווק ודוברות כפיפות: סמנכ"ל שיווק מיקום גאוגרפי: , בית דגן מהות התפקיד: פונקציה האחראית על הובלת מוצרים דיגיטליים ותהליכי חדשנות בקבוצת אגד, תוך שילוב בין חוויית משתמש, טכנולוגיה, שירות ויעדים עסקיים. תיאור התפקיד: ניהול מוצר מקצה לקצה עבור אפליקציית EGG, כולל אפיון פיצ’רים, UXניהול מוצר מקצה לקצה עבור אפליקציית פיצ’רים, הובלת Roadmap, עבודה מול צוותי פיתוח, UX דאטה, שירות ושיווק, שיפור מתמיד של חוויית המשתמש. אחריות על ניהול ופיתוח אתרי האינטרנט של הקבוצה (אתרי מידע ושירות), תוך שיפור ביצועים, נגישות, SEO וחוויית משתמש. הובלת פרויקטי AI במערכי שירות הלקוחות – הטמעת פתרונות בינה מלאכותית במוקדים קולי ובערוצי WhatsApp, כולל אוטומציות שירות, התאמת חוויית שיחה וייעול תהליכים תפעוליים.
  
  
**עבודה שוטפת מול ממשקים רבים בארגון:** מערכות מידע, דיגיטל, שירות לקוחות, ספקים חיצוניים והנהלה בכירה. ניתוח נתונים ומדדי שימוש לצורך קבלת החלטות מבוססות דאטה ושיפור ביצועים עסקיים ותפעוליים. הובלת תהליכי חדשנות דיגיטלית ושיפור חוויית הלקוח בכלל נכסי הדיגיטל של הארגון. 5 שנות ניסיון בתפקיד ניהול שיווק מוצרים ניסיון בעבודת ניהול אפליקציות הגדרת Roadmap ואסטרטגיית מוצר הבנה טכנולוגית ויכולת עבודה מול צוותי פיתוח ניסיון מעשי בעבודה עם כלי AI כישורים נדרשים: ראייה מערכתית יצירתיות חשיבה אנליטית.
  
  
יכולת ניהול ממשקים מרובים בסביבה עתירת משימות

title: DevOps Automation & Release Engineering Specialist
description:
לארגון גדול במודיעין DevOps Automation & Release Engineering Special קבוצת יעל מגייסת : תיאור התפקיד אחריות על תפעול, תחזוקה וניהול שוטף של סביבת Azure ו-AKS. ניטור, טיפול בתקלות, ניתוח כשלים והבטחת זמינות גבוהה של מערכות קריטיות. בנייה, שיפור ותחזוקה של תהליכי CI/CD באמצעות Azure DevOps. פיתוח ותחזוקת YAML Pipelines, תבניות אוטומציה וסטנדרטים ארגוניים.
  
  
הובלת תהליכי Release Management מקצה לקצה, כולל אישורים, Rollout, Rollback ובקרות פרודקשן. אוטומציה של תהליכי Deployment לסביבות Kubernetes ו-AKS. ניהול והרשאות בסביבת Azure DevOps, כולל Repositories, Pipelines, Environments, Service Connections ו-Approval Flows. שילוב פתרונות אבטחה בתהליכי הפיתוח וההפצה, כולל Key Vault, Secrets, Certificates וניהול גישה מאובטח.
  
  
הובלת תהליכי Governance, גיבוש נהלים, סטנדרטים ומתודולוגיות עבודה. פיתוח כלי Self-Service ותבניות עבודה עבור צוותי הפיתוח. כתיבת תיעוד טכני, Runbooks, נהלי תפעול, מדריכי Onboarding ונהלי Recovery. עבודה שוטפת מול צוותי פיתוח, QA, תשתיות, אבטחת מידע, ענן ותפעול.
  
  
מודל עבודה היברידי. ניסיון משמעותי Hands-On בתפקיד DevOps / Cloud Infrastructure Engineer. ניסיון מעשי מוכח בעבודה עם Azure DevOps בארגונים גדולים. ניסיון בבנייה ותחזוקה של YAML Pipelines.
  
  
ניסיון בהקמה וניהול של תהליכי CI/CD בסביבות DEV, TEST, QA ו-PROD. ניסיון מעשי בעבודה עם AKS / Kubernetes ובאוטומציית Deployments. ניסיון בניהול תהליכי Release Engineering ו-Deployment Governance. ניסיון בניהול Artifacts, Versioning, Packaging ו-Promotion Processes.
  
  
ניסיון בהטמעת Key Vault, Secrets, Certificates ופתרונות גישה מאובטחת. ניסיון בכתיבת סקריפטים ואוטומציה באמצעות PowerShell, Bash, Python, Node.js או טכנולוגיות דומות. ניסיון בעבודה עם Git, Branching Strategies, Pull Requests ו-Code Reviews. ניסיון בניהול הרשאות, Service Connections ואבטחת Pipelines ב-Azure DevOps.
  
  
ניסיון בעבודה עם Infrastructure as Code, בדגש על Terraform. יכולת Troubleshooting גבוהה וביצוע Root Cause Analysis לתקלות CI/CD ו-Production. ניסיון בגיבוש נהלים, סטנדרטים ותהליכי עבודה ארגוניים. יכולת עבודה עצמאית, הובלה מקצועית וראייה מערכתית רחבה.

title: מומחה/ית תקשורת ואבטחת מידע לארגון ציבורי באזור המרכז
description: ארגון ציבורי במרכז הארץ מגייס מומחה/ית תקשורת ואבטחת מידע התפקיד כולל: עבודה עם תשתיות תקשורת ארגוניות ומערכות אבטחת מידע קריטיות, תכנון והקמה של רשתות, תחזוקה שוטפת של ציוד תקשורת במספר אתרים, זיהוי ופתרון תקלות מורכבות, עבודה עם כלי ניטור ובקרה, ניהול סיכונים ואכיפת מדיניות אבטחת מידע, וכן הובלת פרויקטים בתחום התקשורת והסייבר ועוד. - 5 שנות ניסיון כטכנאי/ת או מומחה/ית תקשורת - ניסיון עם ציוד Cisco והיכרות עם פרוטוקולים כגון: BGP, OSPF, VLANs, STP, QoS - ניסיון בעבודה עם מערכות ניטור וניהול רשתות כגון: Cisco DNA Center, Aruba Centra וכלי ניתוח כמו: Wireshark, NetFlow - ניסיון בתכנון, התקנה ותחזוקה של רשתות מאובטחות והיכרות עם תחום אבטחת מידע - ניסיון בעבודה עם SDA, סביבות אלחוטיות וכן היכרות עם Linux

title: Staff Agentic AI Security Engineer
description:
### **General Information**

Req #

100017171

Career area:

Research/Development

Country/Region:

Israel

State:

Tel Aviv District

City:

Tel Aviv-Yafo

Date:

Thursday, June 11, 2026

**Additional Locations**:

* Israel

### **Why Work at Lenovo**

We are Lenovo. We do what we say. We own what we do. We WOW our customers.

  
  

Lenovo is a US$83 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked #196 in the Fortune Global 500, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world’s largest PC company with a full-stack portfolio of AI-enabled, AI-ready, and AI-optimized devices (PCs, workstations, smartphones, tablets), infrastructure (server, storage, edge, high performance computing and software defined infrastructure), software, solutions, and services. Lenovo’s continued investment in world-changing innovation is building a more equitable, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. Lenovo is listed on the Hong Kong stock exchange under Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992) (ADR: LNVGY).

  
  

To find out more visit www.lenovo.com and read about the latest news via our StoryHub.

### **Description and Requirements**

**Please note that the team has moved to a new location. The office is now at 121 Menachem Begin Road, Tel Aviv, 61st floor, in the POINT office complex. As per our office policy, you will be required to visit the site at least three times a week.**

Lenovo Digital Trust Lab is seeking a Staff Agentic AI Security Engineer to own the technical direction of AI-powered security agents and lead their development across the team. This is a senior individual contributor role for an engineer who combines deep security expertise with hands-on experience shipping autonomous agent systems in production. The role involves close collaboration with detection, AppSec, IR, and platform leadership, with direct access to frontier models at scale.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define the technical vision and architecture for the agentic security platform — covering planning, orchestration, tool use, memory, and guardrails.
* Own the most complex, highest-impact security agents end-to-end: from problem framing and prototyping through deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement in production.
* Establish evaluation discipline across the org — including ground-truth datasets, offline/online evals, regression suites, and observability tooling for non-deterministic agent behavior.
* Benchmark and integrate frontier models (Claude, GPT, Gemini) on security tasks; translate emerging capabilities into concrete product bets.
* Build shared infrastructure — prompting frameworks, retrieval pipelines, guardrails, cost controls — that the entire team builds on.
* Partner with internal security stakeholders to identify high-leverage opportunities and translate ambiguous security problems into robust agent designs.
* Mentor engineers across the team through design reviews, pairing, and setting engineering standards for agent quality, safety, and reliability.
* Track research, model releases, and emerging techniques; translate relevant developments into a concrete roadmap.

**Requirements**

* BSc in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience; advanced degree (MSc/PhD) in CS, Cybersecurity, or a related field is an advantage.
* 5+ years of software development experience with demonstrated senior or staff-level technical ownership across teams or large projects.
* Deep security engineering foundations: vulnerability research, exploitation techniques across modern web apps and APIs, threat modeling, and security best practices across on-prem, cloud, and SaaS environments.
* Expert-level hands-on experience designing and shipping autonomous AI agents in production — including planning, tool use, multi-step reasoning, error recovery, and multi-agent architectures.
* Proficiency with agent orchestration frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, or custom planners), RAG, context engineering, MCP, and related agentic harness patterns.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals: production-quality Python and at least one additional language, distributed systems, APIs, and data pipelines.
* Experience building evaluation infrastructure for non-deterministic systems — datasets, benchmarks, regression suites, and observability tooling.
* Professional proficiency in English (written and verbal) required; strong communication skills for cross-functional collaboration with security and platform leadership.

**What We Offer:**

* Health & Disability Insurance
* Pension/ Retirement Plan
* Meal Vouchers
* Employee Referral Bonus
* Children of Lenovo Employees Scholarship Program
* Lenovo and Motorola Product Discounts
* Employee Assistance Program, e.g., for health, legal & financial consultancy
* Internal E-learning Development Platform Available for Employees

*We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class.*

**Additional Locations**:

* Israel

* Israel

**AI PROCESSING NOTICE**

We use AI-based tools to support some of our processes (e.g. online interviews recordings and transcripts) in order to achieve better efficiency, accuracy and for our documentation purposes. AI can make mistakes, but we always make sure that the outputs are manually reviewed by a human. You can always opt-out or contact us in case of any question.

title: Frontend Engineer
description:
About **Zscaler**

Zscaler accelerates digital transformation to ensure our customers can be more agile, efficient, resilient, and secure. As an **AI-forward enterprise**, we are constantly pushing the envelope, leveraging the world's largest security data lake to power our cloud-native Zero Trust Exchange platform. This innovation protects our customers from cyberattacks and data loss by securely connecting users, devices, and applications in any location.

Here, **impact in your role matters more than title** and trust is built on results. We say, impact over activity. We seek innovators who actively use AI to amplify their impact and who thrive in an environment where we leverage intelligent systems to stay ahead of evolving threats. We believe in transparency and value **constructive, honest debate**—we're focused on getting to the best ideas, faster. We build high-performing teams that can make an impact quickly and with high quality. To do this, we are building a culture of execution centered on **customer obsession**, collaboration, ownership, and accountability.

We value high-impact, high-accountability with a sense of urgency where you're enabled to do your best work and embrace your potential. If you're driven by purpose, thrive on solving complex challenges, and want to be part of the team that's helping to secure the AI age, we invite you to bring your talents to Zscaler and help shape the future of cybersecurity.

**Role** We are looking for a Frontend Engineer to join our team. This is a hybrid based in Israel role, reporting to the Sr. Manager, Software Engineering in the Analytics department. You will play a pivotal role in translating complex data challenges into seamless, elegant user experiences. We are dedicated to building best-in-class tools that empower security experts to manage risks efficiently through intuitive design and clear, actionable insights.

**What you'll do (Role Expectations)**

* Design and develop user interfaces for our UVM application using React and TypeScript
* Build efficient, reusable, and scalable frontend features
* Lead technical design and development cycles from concept through to production
* Partner closely with UX designers, product managers, and other engineers to bridge the gap between technical power and user experience
* Drive the evolution of our frontend stack by researching and applying new technologies and best practices

**Who You Are (Success Profile)**

* You thrive in ambiguity. You're comfortable building the path as you walk it. You thrive in a dynamic environment, seeing ambiguity not as a hindrance, but as the raw material to build something meaningful.
* You act like an owner. Your passion for the mission fuels your bias for action. You operate with integrity because you genuinely care about the outcome. True ownership involves leveraging dynamic range: the ability to navigate seamlessly between high-level strategy and hands-on execution.
* You are a problem-solver. You love running towards the challenges because you are laser-focused on finding the solution, knowing that solving the hard problems delivers the biggest impact.
* You are a high-trust collaborator. You are ambitious for the team, not just yourself. You embrace our challenge culture by giving and receiving ongoing feedback—knowing that candor delivered with clarity and respect is the truest form of teamwork and the fastest way to earn trust.
* You are a learner. You have a true growth mindset and are obsessed with your own development, actively seeking feedback to become a better partner and a stronger teammate. You love what you do and you do it with purpose.

**What We're Looking for (Minimum Qualifications)**

* Foundational understanding of AI/ML technologies and experience leveraging, securing, or positioning AI-driven solutions to optimize outcomes within your functional domain
* 2+ years of professional experience building frontend applications using React
* Understanding of frontend architecture, state management, and concepts of scalable systems
* Experience in designing, developing, and testing high-quality UI components
* Strong problem-solving skills with a passion for complex data challenges and excellent communication abilities

**What Will Make You Stand Out (Preferred Qualifications)**

* Experience developing frontend components for AI-driven analytics, data visualization of machine learning models, or integrating GenAI workflow tools

title: Tech Lead, Android Core Product - Haifa, Israel
description:
The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.

Over 50 million people use Speechify's text-to-speech products to turn whatever they're reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify's text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its Design award winner for inclusivity for 2025.

Today, nearly 200 people around the globe work on Speechify in a 100% distributed setting – Speechify has no office. These include frontend and backend engineers, AI research scientists, and others from Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, leading PhD programs like Stanford, high growth startups like Stripe, Vercel, Bolt, and many founders of their own companies.

**Overview**

With the growth of our Android app, being the most used text-to-speech app in the Play Store, we find the need for a Senior Android Engineer to help us support the new user base as well as work on new and exciting projects to push us forward.

This is a key role and ideal for someone who thinks strategically, enjoys fast-paced environments, passionate about making product decisions, and has experience building great user experiences that delight users.

We are a flat organization that allows anyone to become a leader by showing excellent technical skills and delivering results consistently and fast. Work ethic, solid communication skills, and obsession with winning are paramount.

Our interview process involves several technical interviews and we aim to complete them within 1 week.

**What Yo****u'****ll Do**

* Owning major features and working closely with our design team - take ownership of features inside the app and become responsible of delivering high quality features
* Shape the future of our Android team
* Own, maintain and improve reliability metrics for key features
* Participate in discussions across different teams - Product, Design, Engineering
* Review pull requests, and support other teammates
* Handle critical issues or cope with unexpected challenges
* Take ownership of feature releases and provide nightly builds for the QA team

**An Ideal Candidate Should Have**

* 5+ years of software engineering experience
* Familiarity with Android components
* Experience building or contributing to at least one Android app
* Product design intuition and user empathy
* Drive to push the boundaries of Android UI/UX
* Understanding of the importance of tests and how to approach writing tests
* Self-drive to improve the app and codebase above and beyond what's outlined in the spec
* Rock solid experience with Kotlin, Kotlin Coroutines, Kotlin Flow, Dagger 2, MVVM, Clean Architecture, Background Services, Music Player Service, Android Animations, Jetpack Navigation, JUnit tests
* Excellent communication skills
* User oriented problem solving approach
* Driven with continuous feedback from leaders

**Bonus:**

* Experience building, maintaining, or otherwise contributing to open source projects in Android
* Experience with iOS, Web or NodeJS

**Technologies we use:**

* Kotlin
* Kotlin Coroutines
* Kotlin Flow
* Jetpack Navigation
* Dagger 2
* Room
* Custom Views, Canvas & Paint
* Jetpack Compose
* JUnit

**What We offer**:

* A fast-growing environment where you can help shape the company and product.
* An entrepreneurial-minded team that supports risk, intuition, and hustle.
* A hands-off management approach so you can focus and do your best work.
* An opportunity to make a big impact in a transformative industry.
* Competitive salaries, a friendly and laid-back atmosphere, and a commitment to building a great asynchronous culture.
* Opportunity to work on a life-changing product that millions of people use.
* Build products that directly impact and support people with learning differences like dyslexia, ADD, low vision, concussions, autism, and more.
* Work in one of the fastest growing sectors of tech, the intersection of artificial intelligence and audio.

**Think you're a good fit for this job?**

Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.
  
And don't forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.

**Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?**

Refer them!

**Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.**

Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

title: מנהלי/ות מחלקת פרויקטים באגפי הביצוע
description:
חברת נתיבי ישראל - החברה הלאומית לתשתיות תחבורה בע"מ פונה בבקשה להצגת מועמדות לתפקיד הבא: מנהלי/ות מחלקת פרויקטים באגפי הביצוע הנדסה ופיתוח משרה מס' 2213/26 להגשת מועמדות יש להיכנס לקישור המצורף ולבחור במשרה הרלוונטית בעמוד הדרושים בציון משרה מס' 2213/26 מועד אחרון להגשה הינו 25.6.26 בשעה 23:59 רק פניות מתאימות תענינה \*המודעה פונה לנשים ולגברים כאחד תינתן עדיפות למועמדים עם מוגבלות, למי שהוא או שאחד מהוריו נולדו באתיופיה ולבני העדה הדרוזית תנאי סף : • מהנדס אזרחי הרשום בפנקס המהנדסים והאדריכלים עם ניסיון מקצועי של שלוש שנים לפחות, בעשר השנים האחרונות, בתכנון ו/או ניהול התכנון ו/או ניהול הביצוע בפרויקטי תשתית ובינוי, מתוכן ניסיון מקצועי של שנה לפחות בניהול התכנון והביצוע ו/או בניהול הביצוע בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים. או לחילופין הנדסאי בניין בעל הסמכה ממה"ט (המכון הממשלתי להכשרה בטכנולוגיה ובמדע), הרשום במרשם ההנדסאים והטכנאים עם ניסיון מקצועי של שלוש שנים לפחות, בעשר השנים האחרונות, בתכנון ו/או ניהול התכנון ו/או ניהול הביצוע בפרויקטי תשתית ובינוי, מתוכן ניסיון מקצועי של שנתיים לפחות בניהול התכנון והביצוע ו/או בניהול הביצוע בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים. • ניסיון של שנתיים לפחות בניהול מקצועי של 3 עובדים אורגנים ו/או חיצונים. יתרונות : • ניסיון ניהולי הנדסי, במהלך חמש השנים האחרונות, בסביבה מרובת פרויקטי ביצוע\* של תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים.
  
  

* לעיניין זה ניהולי הנדסי בסביבה מרובת פרוייקטי ביצוע תחשב כניהול הביצוע של לפחות 7 חוזים קבלניים בחמש שנים האחרונות כאשר היקף כל פרוייקט הינו מינ' 5 מלש"ח. • ניסיון של שלוש שנים לפחות בניהול הביצוע בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים. • הכרות עם עבודה ב/מול גופים ציבוריים ו/או ממשלתיים. • ניסיון בעבודה ב/מול חברת נתיבי ישראל.
* ניסיון עבודה במערכות ממוחשבות כגון אוטוקד, MS Projects ודומיו.

title: Principal Engineer – RISC-V CPU Sub-System Architecture - Hod Hasharon / Haifa
description:
**Company:**
------------

Qualcomm Israel Ltd.

**Job Area:**
-------------

Engineering Group, Engineering Group > Modem Technologies

**General Summary:**

**Principal Engineer – RISC-V CPU Sub-System Architecture (Israel)**

**Location**

Israel (Hod Hasharon / Haifa)

**About the Role**

* Qualcomm is seeking a Principal Engineer to lead the architecture and integration of next-generation RISC-V CPU sub-systems used across modem, connectivity, and embedded control-plane solutions. This role spans architecture definition, system integration, and silicon execution, collaborating across CPU RTL, SoC, firmware, modeling, and verification teams.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Own CPU sub-system architecture including core integration, cache hierarchy, memory, and interconnect
* Define architecture specifications and integration guidelines
* Lead integration into complex SoCs and align across HW/SW teams
* Drive PPA tradeoffs (performance, power, area)
* Diagnose system-level issues across architecture, RTL, DV, and firmware
* Act as technical focal point across global teams
* Lead architecture and design reviews
* Mentor engineers across architecture and VLSI teams
* Define and integrate NoC architecture including traffic, QoS, and scalability
* Define and work with high-performance bus protocols including AXI and CHI

**Minimum Qualifications**

* B.Sc. in Electrical Engineering / Computer Engineering / Computer Science
* 10+ years of experience
* Strong background in CPU/SoC architecture
* Deep knowledge of cache, memory, and interconnect systems
* Experience with RISC-V or similar architectures
* Strong RTL development experience
* Experience with NoC architecture and on-chip interconnects
* Experience with AXI / CHI protocols
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Ownership of CPU or subsystem through full silicon lifecycle
* Experience with NoC / interconnect / DDR systems
* Strong understanding of AXI/CHI coherency and system integration
* Experience with multi-core system design
* Familiarity with firmware-HW interaction
* Experience in global cross-functional teams

**Minimum Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related field and 8+ years of Software Engineering, Hardware Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Systems Engineering, or related work experience.

OR
  
Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related field and 7+ years of Software Engineering, Hardware Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Systems Engineering, or related work experience.
  
OR
  
PhD in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related field and 6+ years of Software Engineering, Hardware Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Systems Engineering, or related work experience.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Master's degree or PhD in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related field.

* 8+ years of experience with programming (e.g., C, C++, Python), computer architecture, or embedded systems.
* 4+ years of experience working in a large matrixed organization.

* 4+ years in a technical leadership role with or without direct reports (only applies to positions with direct reports).
* 3+ years of work experience in a role requiring interaction with senior leadership (e.g., Vice President level and above).

* 2+ years working with operating budgets and/or project financials.

* 1+ year of applicable wireless, semiconductor and/or embedded software industry experience.

* 6+ months of WWAN modem development specific experience.

**Principal Duties and Responsibilities:**  

* Leverages expert understanding to make architectural decisions and lead multiple areas within modem hardware, systems, or firmware; serves as subject matter expert and advisor to cross-functional teams; conducts design reviews, makes project schedules and delivers to those project schedules across multiple technologies to deliver modem products in meeting customer needs and aligning with the broader strategy/roadmap.
* Serves as a technical expert in identifying patterns of issues in design and implications for work across teams; provides support to multiple teams to address issues and generate solutions; creates well-defined architectures that meet ambiguous requirements and/or have a financial impact; communicates technical vision and guides cross-functional efforts across multiple teams to design products and solutions that meet customer requirements and standards.
* Acts as a technical lead and owns complete verification for system, including system performance and quality; supports multiple teams through verification and validation of design; defines specifications for modem quality; works with leaders to guide architectural decisions related to modem and/or products.
* Provides technical expertise and collaborates with leaders to resolve systems-level issues during implementation and commercialization; owns successful modem technology bring-up and resolution of customer/field issues.
* Acts as a technical expert to others on industry trends, competitors' products, and advances in various engineering fields related to modem products and technology; shares expertise within and/or across teams.
* Leverages deep technical expertise to identify trends and define future solutions by contributing to discussions on the short- and long-term strategic direction of the product/technology roadmaps.
* Guides team members to write clear and detailed technical documentation and feature descriptions; reviews documentation to ensure it can be easily understood by a variety of audiences.

**Level of Responsibility:**  

* Working independently with little supervision.
* Providing supervision to others who may be direct reports.
* Making decisions that are significant in impact, influencing overall program or project success, finances, and/or the ability to meet objectives; errors are not readily apparent due to the complexity of work process/product or time between decisions and results; errors typically result in significant expenditure of time, resources, and funds to correct.
* Using verbal and written communication skills to convey complex and/or detailed information to multiple individuals/audiences with differing knowledge levels; may require strong negotiation and influence, communication to large groups or high-level constituents.
* Developing and administering budgets, schedules, and performance standards for functional area within the prescribed budgetary objectives of the department.
* Having a great degree of influence over key organizational decisions (e.g., is making or directly making key decisions that have substantial impact on the organization).
* Completing tasks that do not have defined steps; simultaneous use of multiple mental abilities is generally required to determine the best approach; mistakes may result in significant rework.
* Exercising exceptional creativity to innovate new ideas and develop innovative products/processes without established objectives or known parameters.
* Using deductive and inductive problem solving; multiple approaches may be taken/necessary to solve the problem; often information is missing or conflicting; advanced data analysis and interpretation skills are required.
* Occasionally participating in strategic planning within own area affecting immediate operations.

\*References to a particular number of years experience are for indicative purposes only. Applications from candidates with equivalent experience will be considered, provided that the candidate can demonstrate an ability to fulfill the principal duties of the role and possesses the required competencies.

Qualcomm is an equal opportunity employer. If you are an individual with a disability and need an accommodation during the application/hiring process, rest assured that Qualcomm is committed to providing an accessible process. You may e-mail disability-accomodations@qualcomm.com or call Qualcomm's toll-free number found here . Upon request, Qualcomm will provide reasonable accommodations to support individuals with disabilities to be able participate in the hiring process. Qualcomm is also committed to making our workplace accessible for individuals with disabilities. (Keep in mind that this email address is used to provide reasonable accommodations for individuals with disabilities. We will not respond here to requests for updates on applications or resume inquiries).

Qualcomm expects its employees to abide by all applicable policies and procedures, including but not limited to security and other requirements regarding protection of Company confidential information and other confidential and/or proprietary information, to the extent those requirements are permissible under applicable law.

**To all Staffing and Recruiting Agencies** : Our Careers Site is only for individuals seeking a job at Qualcomm. Staffing and recruiting agencies and individuals being represented by an agency are not authorized to use this site or to submit profiles, applications or resumes, and any such submissions will be considered unsolicited. Qualcomm does not accept unsolicited resumes or applications from agencies. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Qualcomm employees or any other company location. Qualcomm is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes/applications.

If you would like more information about this role, please contact Qualcomm Careers .

title: מנהלי/ות מחלקת פרויקטים בכירים/ות לניהול התכנון - מרחבי
description:
חברת נתיבי ישראל - החברה הלאומית לתשתיות תחבורה בע"מ פונה בבקשה להצגת מועמדות לתפקיד הבא: מנהלי/ות מחלקת פרויקטים בכירים/ות לניהול התכנון - מרחבי הנדסה ופיתוח משרה מס' 2211/26 להגשת מועמדות יש להיכנס לקישור המצורף ולבחור במשרה הרלוונטית בעמוד הדרושים בציון משרה מס' 2211/26 מועד אחרון להגשה הינו 25.6.26 בשעה 23:59 רק פניות מתאימות תענינה \*המודעה פונה לנשים ולגברים כאחד תינתן עדיפות למועמדים עם מוגבלות, למי שהוא או שאחד מהוריו נולדו באתיופיה ולבני העדה הדרוזית תנאי סף : • מהנדס אזרחי הרשום בפנקס המהנדסים והאדריכלים. • בעל ניסיון מקצועי של 7 שנים לפחות בעשר השנים האחרונות בתכנון ו/או בניהול תכנון ו/או ניהול ביצוע בפרויקטי תשתית ובינוי, מתוכן ניסיון מקצועי של 3 שנים לפחות בתכנון ו/או בניהול התכנון ו/או ניהול ביצוע בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים. • בעל ניסיון של שנתיים לפחות בניהול מקצועי של 3 עובדים אורגנים ו/או חיצוניים. יתרונות : • ניסיון של שלוש שנים לפחות בתחום ניהול התכנון בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים.
  
  

* ניסיון של שנתיים לפחות בתכנון ו/או בקרת שלבי ביצוע בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים. • ניסיון של שנתיים לפחות בליווי פרויקטים בשלב סטטוטורי. • ניסיון של שנה לפחות בתחום ניהול ביצוע בפרויקטי תשתיות לפיתוח כבישים בין עירוניים או עירוניים. • ניסיון בעבודה מול משרד התחבורה ו/או חברה ממשלתית מטעמו.
