title: טכנאי/ת שירות
description:
טכנאי/ת שירות

**Smart Shooter היא חברה ציבורית ישראלית בתחום ההגנה וביטחון העוסקת בפיתוח ובייצור של מערכות בקרת ירי חכמות לנשק קל. באמצעות טכנולוגיות מתקדמות של עיבוד תמונה ובינה מלאכותית המערכות מגדילות את דיוק הירי ומשפרות באופן ניכר את אחוזי הפגיעה במגוון סוגי מטרות (קרקעיות, אוויריות, סטטיות או נעות, ביום ובלילה). החברה מפתחת, משווקת ומייצרת מערכות בתחומי האלאקטרואופטיקה ומציאות רבודה לכוחות הלוחמים ביבשה, באוויר ובים.**

התפקיד כולל:

* תחזוקה שוטפת של מערכות וציוד מבצעי.
* ביצוע עבודות הרכבה ופירוק בהתאם לנהלים.
* איתור תקלות בסיסי וביצוע פעולות תחזוקה מונעת.
* עבודה מול צוותי הייצור, האינטגרציה והלוגיסטיקה.
* תיעוד פעולות וביצוע בקרות איכות בסיסיות.

\*משרה מלאה ממשרדי החברה\*

\*יש אפשרות למשרה זמנית ולעבודה מועדפת.\*

  
Requirements:  
  

**דרישות**

* ניסיון קודם בתחזוקת ציוד טכני, מכני או מבצעי – חובה.
* רקע בעבודה עם נשק, מערכות נשק או ציוד צבאי – יתרון משמעותי.
* אוריינטציה טכנית ויכולת עבודה עם כלי עבודה ידניים.
* יכולת עבודה עצמאית ובצוות.

title: Firmware Embedded - MSP
description:
Our team is looking for an FW engineer to design, develop, and implement complex SW modules for the Apple production line. The integration will require cooperation with other teams and vendors abroad. You’ll be part of a team developing complex and versatile hardware/software integrated solutions for mission-critical tasks in future Apple products.
  
Are you a big-picture thinker who loves setting ambitious goals?  
Do you have a passion for understanding how each line of code affects all the others?
  
Your dedication to cross-disciplinary collaboration will help develop groundbreaking technologies like iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS. By crafting these distinct, holistic user experiences, you’ll continue to uphold and advance the excellence people expect from Apple devices.  
  
**Description**  
Take part in SW design sessions (detailed designs involving system understanding), provide HLD and LLD documentation of central SW modules, participate in the coding of complex SW modules, debug complicated (system-wide) bugs, and lead HW-SW integrations.  
  
**Preferred Qualifications**  
Low Level Embedded software/firmware development and firmware architecture - Advantage
  
Experience and proficiency in C development
  
Exceptional problem-solving and debugging skills
  
Independent, highly motivated, with good interpersonal skills  
  
**Minimum Qualifications**  
BS in Computer Science / Electrical Engineering / Computer Engineering or equivalent experience

title: ראש צוות מנהלי פרויקטים ומנהלי מערכות דיגיטל
description:
לארגון בריאות במרכז דרוש/ה ראש צוות להובלה ניהולית, מקצועית וטכנולוגית של צוות מנהלי פרויקטים ומנהלי מערכות במחלקת הדיגיטל. התפקיד כולל אחריות על הובלת פרויקטים טכנולוגיים רוחביים מורכבים, ניהול תוכניות עבודה, הובלת תהליכי Delivery ותפעול מערכות, תוך עבודה מול גורמים עסקיים וטכנולוגיים רבים בארגון. התפקיד משלב יכולות ניהול גבוהות לצד הבנה טכנולוגית מעמיקה בעולמות הדיגיטל, התשתיות, האינטגרציה והענן, כולל ליווי והכוונה מקצועית לצוותים בנושאים מורכבים. העבודה בממשק שוטף עם צוותי פיתוח, תשתיות, אבטחת מידע, ארכיטקטורה, אינטגרציה, ספקים ולקוחות פנימיים בארגון.
  
  

* תואר ראשון בהנדסת תעשייה וניהול / מערכות מידע / מדעי המחשב או תחום רלוונטי - חובה. • ניסיון של לפחות 6 שנים בניהול פרויקטים טכנולוגיים - חובה. • ניסיון של לפחות שנתיים בניהול צוות מנהלי פרויקטים ו/או מנהלי מערכות - חובה. • ניסיון בהובלת פרויקטי Digital, היכרות מעמיקה עם סביבות Web, Mobile - חובה.
* ניסיון בניהול פרויקטים תשתיתיים וטכנולוגיים מורכבים כולל עבודה מול תשתיות, אינטגרציה, אבטחת מידע וארכיטקטורה - חובה. • ניסיון בניהול תוכניות עבודה, תקציבים (מעל 2 משח) , ספקים ורכש - חובה. • ניסיון בהובלת עליות לייצור וניהול גרסאות - חובה. • ניסיון בעבודה במתודולוגיית Agile ובצוותי Scrum - חובה.
* ניסיון בעבודה עם כלי ניהול כגון ADO ו-Monday - חובה. • היכרות עם כלי AI ויישומם בתהליכי עבודה, ניהול וניתוח - חובה. • ניסיון בעבודה בארגון Enterprise גדול - יתרון. • היכרות עם טכנולוגיות כגון Kafka, Couchbase, Elastic, SQL, KSQL, Azure, Umbraco - יתרון.
* ניסיון בניהול מערכות Production קריטיות - יתרון.

title: Senior Product Manager, Offensive Security (Tel Aviv, Israel)
description:
Why eSentire
  
eSentire is the Authority in Managed Detection and Response, protecting the critical data and applications of 2000+ organizations in 80+ countries from known and unknown cyber threats. As a senior product leader here, you'll work alongside world-class threat researchers, SOC operators, and security engineers — with direct access to real-world attack telemetry that few product teams can match.
  
About the Role
  
eSentire is looking for a Product Manager, Offensive Security to own the product vision and roadmap for our penetration testing, vulnerability management, and attack surface management capabilities. This is a senior individual contributor role — you will set direction, define requirements, and drive outcomes across engineering, delivery, and go-to-market teams without direct people management responsibilities.
  
Based in Tel Aviv, you will be embedded in one of the world's most concentrated cybersecurity talent ecosystems. You will collaborate closely with eSentire's global product and engineering teams across North America, with core working hours designed to support meaningful overlap with EST/CST time zones.
  
What You'll Own
  

* Roadmap & vision. Define and own the multi-year product roadmap for offensive security and exposure management — pen testing, vulnerability management, and attack surface management.
* Platform development. Partner with engineering to build and continuously improve the platform features that underpin eSentire's offensive security service delivery.
* Customer & market insight. Conduct ongoing discovery with customers, prospects, and internal practitioners to surface unmet needs and validate product direction.
* Go-to-market alignment. Collaborate with product marketing, sales, and solutions teams to translate product capabilities into compelling positioning, pricing and packaging, and enablement materials.
* Daily requirements. Drive day-to-day requirements definition and backlog refinement with engineering — writing clear user stories, acceptance criteria, and sprint priorities that keep delivery moving without sacrificing product quality.
* Competitive intelligence. Track the offensive security and exposure management landscape — vendors, frameworks (CVSS, EPSS, CTEM), and emerging attacker techniques — and incorporate findings into roadmap decisions.
* Outcome measurement. Define and track product KPIs tied to customer risk reduction and platform adoption; use data to drive prioritization decisions.

What You Bring
  
We're looking for candidates who combine hands-on security expertise with the product craft to turn that expertise into a scalable platform.
  
Required
  

* 5+ years of product management experience, with a demonstrated track record of shipping complex B2B platform products.
* Hands-on background in offensive security — you have worked in or directly alongside penetration testing, red teaming, vulnerability management, or attack surface management, and can hold a credible technical conversation with practitioners.
* Deep familiarity with the exposure management landscape: CVSS/EPSS scoring, BAS, EASM, and CTEM frameworks.
* Experience working within an MSSP or MDR environment, or building products for one — you understand the service delivery model and its constraints.
* Demonstrated ability to work cross-functionally and drive alignment without authority.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; comfortable presenting to executives and customers.

Nice to Have
  

* Relevant certifications (OSCP, CEH, GPEN, or equivalent).
* Experience with CVE/NVD data pipelines or vulnerability intelligence platforms.
* Familiarity with compliance frameworks (SOC 2, ISO 27001, NIST CSF) and how they intersect with vuln management programs.
* Alumni of elite IDF intelligence, cyber, or technology units (e.g., Unit 8200, Unit 81, Mamram, Matzov) — the operational experience, adversarial mindset, and collaborative culture from these backgrounds are directly applicable to this role.

Working at eSentire — Tel Aviv
  
We have built this role with the Israeli work environment in mind. A few things worth knowing:
  

* Direct culture, welcome here. Israeli professional culture is known for directness, intellectual challenge, and flat hierarchies. We value this. Debate ideas openly, push back on decisions, and expect the same in return.
* Reserve duty (Miluim). We fully support employees with IDF reserve duty obligations. We understand miluim is a civic responsibility and will work with you to manage scheduling without impact to your standing or compensation.
* Holiday calendar. Our Tel Aviv team observes the Israeli public holiday calendar, including Rosh Hashanah, Yom Kippur, Sukkot, Passover, and Independence Day. We plan around these, not over them.
* Work week. We align to the standard Israeli tech work week (Sunday through Thursday), with flexibility built in for cross-timezone collaboration with North American counterparts.
* Time zone collaboration. Core overlap with eSentire's Canadian and US teams is typically mid-morning Israel time (late morning EST). We keep synchronous demands reasonable and document decisions thoroughly for async follow-up.
* Language. English is the working language for cross-functional collaboration. Internal team communication may be in Hebrew.

title: Senior AV Product Manager
description:
Mobileye is seeking Product Managers to lead the development and management of advanced features for autonomous vehicles (AVs). This role will focus on creating exceptional products for both global automotive partners and Mobileye's internal AV development.

### **What will your job look like?**

* Act as a **technical product owner**, for productizing and driving Mobileye's AV features to meet performance and quality goals.
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders (R&D , Product and Business Development) and external partners to define the product **roadmap**, ensuring alignment with Mobileye's strategy and timelines.
* Own the process of **requirements elicitation** to capture stakeholder needs and translate them into actionable product specifications.
* Define and monitor **data-driven performance KPIs** to ensure product excellence.
* Develop and maintain accurate, comprehensive documentation for internal and external use.
* Support Business Development during pre-sale processes and customer onboarding.
* Partner with leading car manufacturers, including conducting workshops, test drives, and product tuning to ensure adoption and satisfaction.
* Champion **cross-functional collaboration**, managing initiatives in a matrix environment to ensure successful execution.

### **All you need is:**

* B.Sc. in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field (M.Sc./MBA is a plus).
* Minimum of 5 years managing technically complex products. (Computer vision or automotive products is a plus)
* Hands-on software development background.
* Previous leadership experience in development management (advantage).
* Proven customer-facing experience with the ability to build strong relationships.
* Strong problem-solving, organizational, and analytical capabilities.
* Outstanding communication skills with the ability to influence and align diverse stakeholders.
* Fluent in English and Hebrew.
* Demonstrated ownership of product quality and excellence.
* A results-driven approach grounded in collaboration, integrity, and innovation.

Mobileye changes the way we drive, from preventing accidents to semi and fully autonomous vehicles. If you are an excellent, bright, hands-on person with a passion to make a difference come to lead the revolution!

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: חברת השילוח והלוגיסטיקה המובילה HFD מחפשת את ה-IT הבא/ה שלנו!
description:
חברת השילוח והלוגיסטיקה המובילה HFD מחפשת את ה-IT הבא/ה שלנו! אנחנו מחפשים איש/ת תמיכה טכנית ו-IT אנרגטי/ת, בעל/ת יכולת ניהול עצמי גבוהה ורצון לצמוח איתנו, להשתלבות במשרה מלאה במטה החברה בפתח תקווה. אם את/ה מחפש/ת תפקיד דינמי, רוצה להוביל תהליכים טכנולוגיים, ליהנות מסביבת עבודה משפחתית ותנאים מעולים – המקום שלך איתנו! תנאי המשרה: היקף המשרה: מלאה, ימים א'-ה'.
  
  
**שעות עבודה:** 08:00-17:00 (ללא סופי שבוע). מיקום: פתח תקווה. תנאים מיוחדים: התפקיד כולל רכב חברה צמוד (לצורך נסיעות וניידות בין סניפי החברה). במסגרת התפקיד: \* אחריות כוללת על תפעול, תחזוקה וניהול תשתיות המחשוב בארגון.
  
  

* מתן תמיכה טכנית שוטפת במערכות הפעלה ותוכנות התקשורת הארגוניות. \* הובלת פרויקטים של שינויים, שדרוגים והטמעת מערכות טכנולוגיות חדשות. \* הקמה, הגדרה וניהול של מדפסות רשת וציוד קצה. \* מענה ופתרון תקלות חומרה ותוכנה עבור ממשקים פנימיים מרובים בחברה.

**דרישות התפקיד:** \* ניסיון ורקע טכני: ידע בסיסי בשרתי טרמינל (Terminal Servers) ויכולת מוכחת בפתרון תקלות (Troubleshooting) – חובה. \* יישומי מחשב: שליטה טובה מאוד ב-Microsoft Excel – חובה. \* רישיון נהיגה: רישיון בתוקף מעל גיל 24 (מטעמי ביטוח רכב החברה) – חובה. \* כישורים אישיים: יכולת עבודה עצמאית, ניהול משימות וסדרי עדיפויות בסביבה דינמית ותחת לחץ.
  
  

* תקשורת בין-אישית: יחסי אנוש מעולים, תודעת שירות גבוהה ויכולת עבודה מול ממשקים מרובים בארגון.

title: Sales Development Representative - Spanish Speaking
description:
Agora is a leading SaaS and FinTech platform transforming how real estate investment firms manage their capital, investors, and operations. Trusted by 700+ GPs, owners/operators, and investment firms globally, we help teams streamline the full lifecycle of investment management—from fundraising and onboarding to reporting, distributions, tax, and back-office automation.

But we’re more than just software. We’re a team of bold thinkers, innovators, and real estate enthusiasts who believe complex processes should feel simple. Our platform combines modern technology with expert services, helping our customers raise more capital, deliver a better investor experience, and scale their businesses smarter.

Agora is backed by top-tier VCs like Insight Partners and Qumra Capital, and we’re growing fast. We’ve been named one of Globes’ Most Promising Startups, recognized as a Best Start-Up Companies to Work For by Duns 100, and one of Business Insider’s Hottest PropTech Startups.

**About the role:**

As a Sales Development Representative at Agora, you'll be on the front line of prospect outreach with the goal of generating qualified opportunities for our sales team. In this role, you will develop and own the "top-of-funnel" through outbound prospecting (cold calling, emailing, and social channels). You will be expected to quickly and effectively communicate our value proposition, respond to objections, and speak confidently to industry trends.

We’re looking for someone who is fully proficient in both **English** and **Spanish**, with strong business communication skills in both languages.

**What your day would look like:**

* **Prospecting Expertise:** Dive into the strategic identification and enrichment of a prospect list tailored to our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP), ensuring a pipeline of qualified leads ready for engagement.
* **Dynamic Multi-Channel Outreach:** Engage with prospects through a seamless blend of phone, email, and LinkedIn interactions. Your mission is to spark interest, build relationships, and set the stage for meaningful conversations.
* **Collaborative Partnership:** Join forces with our sales team in meetings you've scheduled, playing a critical role in facilitating discussions and moving prospects through the sales funnel.
* **Inbound Lead Engagement:** Proactively reach out to inbound leads who have shown interest in our services by filling out forms or expressing curiosity. Your adeptness in quickly connecting and assessing their needs is vital for turning interest into actionable sales opportunities.
* **Skill Enhancement:** Participate in ongoing training and coaching sessions, embracing opportunities to refine your techniques and strategies in sales development, ensuring peak performance and continuous growth in your role

  
Requirements:
  

* 0–1+ year of experience in sales preferred
* A confident, persuasive communicator in both **English** and **Spanish** who can represent the company with clarity and impact
* Hardworking, committed, and driven to grow and succeed
* Self-motivated and comfortable in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
* Strong relationship-builder who connects easily with new people
* Well-organized with excellent time management skills
* Analytical, with a data-informed approach to sales
* Experience with sales tools is a plus, but not required
* This role will be hybrid, in office between 3-4 days a week.

  
Equal opportunity:  
  

Agora Software is an equal opportunity employer. Consistent with our mission of serving a diverse and global audience, we value a diverse workforce and inclusive culture which reflects that. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, marital status, disability, and veteran status.

Please note that we use Spark Hire as part of our hiring process to review and assess job applications and related materials. This tool helps us screen applications more efficiently and ensure candidates meet the role requirements.

As part of this process, we’ll handle your personal information in accordance with our Candidate Privacy Notice. You can review details here: Agora Candidate Privacy Notice.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us at privacy@agorareal.com.

title: 22771 - SAP MM Software Tester
description:

* Collaborate closely with clients to deliver smart, high-quality solutions

* Make an impact in a dynamic, learning-driven environment

* Be part of a human, value-driven organization that cares

title: Product Manager - Agentic AI
description:
Petah Tikva, Central District, Israel Product Engineering Ref ID: JR-018159

**Our Mission**

At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

**Who We Are**

In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!

We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real-time problem-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.

**Job Summary**

Join Palo Alto Networks IDIRA Product Management team in the exciting and rapidly emerging space of Agentic identity.  
As Product Manager, you will lead the roadmap for Agentic Identity part of the IDIRA product management team. This domain is new and evolving quickly, so you’ll need to be comfortable with ambiguity, proactive research, and rapid execution to set the industry standard for how autonomous agents are authenticated and governed in organizations.

* Develop deep expertise with identity management, authentication and authorization standards relevant to Agentic AI, and apply this knowledge to shape product strategy and execution.
* Define and execute the roadmap for IDIRA - Agentic Identity solution, ensuring we set the industry standard for Agentic Identity authentication, authorization, lifecycle, and governance.
* Act as the primary advocate for the developer experience ensuring security solutions smoothly integrate into programmatic agent development without friction.
* Partner with customers and lead interviews to inform product direction and validate new market standards.
* Work closely with other Product Managers and cross-functional units to leverage IDIRA’s existing assets, align them to the Agentic Identity challenges.
* Move fast and iterate—this domain is evolving rapidly, so you’ll need to research, validate, and execute quickly, adapting to new requirements and opportunities as they arise.
* Prioritize high-impact deliveries that address urgent market demand

**Qualifications**

* Proven experience building or architecting Agentic AI solutions using programmatic developer frameworks - Must have.
* Strong technical knowledge of identity & Authentication protocols, such as OAuth/OIDC and SPIFFE/SPIRE.
* Experience working within companies or teams focused NHI, IAM, PAM, IGA - significant advantage.
* 2-3+ Years in Product Management (or equivalent highly technical role such as technical product owner, solution architect, or core developer eager to transition to PM).
* Proven ability to operate effectively in a fast-moving, rapidly changing, and highly ambiguous market segment.
* Experience working with large, global enterprise customers and understanding their security governance requirements.
* Proven technical skills and self-learning ability, capable of thoroughly understanding the functional and technical aspects of a complex system
* Proven ability to succeed in a cross-functional team environment
* Excellent written and verbal communication and presentation skills (mainly in English)
* Pragmatic Marketing methodology knowledge & certification – an advantage
* Experience in information security – an advantage
* BSc in computer-science/engineering, or 2-4 years hands-on experience in software development – an advantage

**Our Commitment**

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.

Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

title: נציג/ת תמיכה טכנית ושירות לקוחות במוקד מוביל - שכר גבוה!!
description:
המוקדים המובילים, היציבים והמצליחים ביותר בארץ מתרחבים ומגייסים נציגי/ות תמיכה טכנית ושירות לקוחות במשגב! מחפשים/ות עבודה דינמית, קצבית ומתגמלת בסביבה טכנולוגית ותומכת, עם שכר מעולה ותנאים סוציאליים מלאים מהיום הראשון? הגעתם/ן למקום הנכון! במסגרת התפקיד – תמיכה ושירות: מתן מענה טלפוני אדיב, סבלני ומקצועי לפניות לקוחות, אבחון תקלות טכניות ומתן פתרונות בשילוב שירות לקוחות שוטף.
  
  
**– ניהול ותיעוד מידע:** ליווי פניות הלקוח מקצה לקצה, הזנת נתונים ועדכון פרטים במערכות המחשב וה-CRM. – עמידה ביעדים: שמירה על סטנדרט שירות גבוה, יעילות, מקצועיות ושביעות רצון הלקוחות. שכר ותנאים – שכר שעתי מתגמל + תנאים סוציאליים מלאים מהיום הראשון! – היקף המשרה: עבודה במשמרות גמישות (משמרות בוקר ומשמרות ערב, מתאים מאוד גם לסטודנטים/ות!).
  
  
**– אופק מקצועי:** אפשרויות קידום מהירות למשרות אחמ"שות, תמיכה בכירה, חניכה וניהול צוות למתאימים/ות. – מיקום: משגב – תודעת שירות גבוהה, סבלנות, אמפתיה ויחסי אנוש מעולים – זיקה טכנית, חוש טכנולוגי ויכולת פתרון בעיות – יכולת ביטוי מצוינת בעברית (בכתב ובעל פה) – שליטה טובה בסביבה ממוחשבת ויכולת עבודה עם מספר מערכות במקביל. – אחריות, חריצות, הגעה בזמן ונכונות לעבודה יציבה לטווח ארוך. שליחת קורות חיים או הגשת מועמדות מהווה הסכמה לכך שחברת ג׳וב ספייס בע״מ תשמור ותשתמש בפרטיך, לרבות למטרת פנייה אליך בנוגע למשרות נוספות ודומות ולהעברת פרטיך למעסיקים פוטנציאליים בעתיד.
  
  
השימוש במידע ייעשה בהתאם למדיניות הפרטיות של החברה ובה גם מידע על זכויותיך. ניתן לסרב לשימוש עתידי כאמור במידע בשליחת ״תמחקו אותי״ או לפנות בכל שאלה או בקשה בנושא לכתובת privacy@jobspacepro.com.

title: מתאמת קשרי לקוחות לבית השקעות בת"א-משרה היברדית
description:

עבודה שמשלבת בק אופיס וקשר מול הלקוח באמצעים טכנולוגיים וטלפוניים. ניסיון בעבודת אדמינסטרציה ושירות קליטה מהירה והגדלת ראש שליטה טובה במערכות ממוחשבות זמינות למשרה מלאה בין 8:30-17:30 היכרות עם חברות מעולמות שוק ההון/בית השקעות-יתרון

title: Head of Brand
description:
**About Sweet Security**

Sweet Security is one of the fastest-growing companies in cloud and AI security, backed by top-tier investors and trusted by leading global enterprises. This is a chance to join at a pivotal moment—where strong product-market fit, real customer momentum, and a bold vision for the AI era are already in motion. The team combines deep technical expertise with a culture of ownership, speed, and high standards, giving you the opportunity to make a real impact, shape the category, and grow alongside a company that's quickly becoming a defining player in modern security.

With $120M in funding, Sweet Security is building the next generation of runtime cloud and AI security.

### **Job Description**

Sweet Security is looking for a **Head of Brand** to define and elevate our brand as we establish ourselves in the evolving categories of cloud runtime and AI security.  
In this role, you will own Sweet Security's brand strategy, positioning, communication and market presence.  
You will shape how the market perceives Sweet Security, ensuring a consistent and competitive brand experience across every touchpoint, and every room.  
Working closely with Product Marketing, Demand Generation, Executive Leadership, and Sales, you will transform market insights into compelling narratives that strengthen awareness, build credibility, and drive long-term business growth.

### **Responsibilities**

* Own and evolve Sweet Security's brand strategy, positioning, and messaging.
* Shape Sweet Security's category narrative and market differentiation.
* Lead Sweet's press and communication strategy, as well as social, brand advocacy, and founders' voice.
* Lead brand campaigns and strategic initiatives that increase awareness and engagement.
* Partner with Product Marketing to translate product innovation into compelling market narratives.
* Drive thought leadership, executive visibility, and corporate communications efforts.
* Own brand performance metrics, including awareness, engagement, and share of voice.
* Work closely with design, content, and external partners to deliver high-quality brand experiences.

### **Requirements**

* 5+ years of brand marketing experience in the cybersecurity industry.
* Proven track record of building and scaling cybersecurity brands in competitive markets.
* Well-connected within the cybersecurity ecosystem, with an understanding of industry communities, media, events, influencers, and market dynamics - a big advantage
* Strong expertise in positioning, messaging, storytelling, and campaign execution.
* Experience working cross-functionally with Product Marketing, Demand Generation, Sales, and Executive Leadership.
* Excellent communication and project management skills.
* Data-driven mindset with the ability to measure brand impact and translate insights into action.
* Hands-on builder who thrives in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.

**Sweet Security** is an equal opportunity employer and is proud to be part of a diverse, multicultural world. We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where every employee has equal opportunities to grow and succeed. We believe that diversity is a key driver of success, and we encourage curiosity, innovation, and the integration of diverse talents across our global teams. All candidates are considered based on their qualifications, experience, and professional fit. We are committed to providing equal opportunities regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.  
At Sweet Security, we see diversity and inclusion as core values, and we actively work to foster a respectful, equitable, and empowering environment for all our employees, customers, and partners.

title: Senior Product Manager, Digital Risk (Tel Aviv, Israel)
description:
Why eSentire
  
eSentire is the Authority in Managed Detection and Response, protecting the critical data and applications of 2000+ organizations in 80+ countries from known and unknown cyber threats. The Digital Risk portfolio sits at a high-growth intersection of human risk, brand protection, and underground intelligence — with an opportunity to shape how a leading MDR provider helps customers manage risk that starts well outside the traditional security perimeter.
  
About the Role
  
eSentire is looking for a Product Manager, Digital Risk to own the product vision and roadmap for our security awareness training (SAT), domain protection, and dark web monitoring capabilities. This is a senior individual contributor role. You will set direction, define requirements, and drive outcomes across engineering, delivery, and go-to-market teams without direct people management responsibilities.
  
This portfolio sits at the intersection of human risk, external digital footprint, and credential and data exposure — three disciplines that together give customers a more complete picture of their risk posture beyond the perimeter. You will be the product authority on this space, translating customer needs and market trends into differentiated platform capabilities.
  
Based in Tel Aviv, you will be embedded in one of the world's most concentrated cybersecurity talent ecosystems, collaborating closely with eSentire's global product, engineering, and go-to-market teams across North America.
  
What You'll Own
  

* Roadmap & vision. Define and own the multi-year product roadmap across security awareness training, domain protection, and dark web monitoring — with a clear through-line connecting human risk reduction to measurable security outcomes.
* Security awareness training (SAT). Drive the product strategy for eSentire's SAT capabilities: training content delivery, phishing simulation, awareness program management, and reporting that demonstrates behaviour change over time.
* Domain protection. Own the platform features that identify and respond to domain-based threats — lookalike domains, brand impersonation, DNS abuse, and takedown workflows — protecting customers' digital identities at scale.
* Dark web monitoring. Define and evolve eSentire's dark web intelligence capabilities: credential exposure monitoring, data leak detection, threat actor forum tracking, and actionable alerting for customers and their third parties.
* Platform development. Partner with engineering to build the integrations, automation, and workflows that make this portfolio operationally cohesive — data ingestion pipelines, customer-facing dashboards, and analyst tooling.
* Customer & market insight. Conduct ongoing discovery with customers, prospects, and internal practitioners to surface unmet needs, validate roadmap direction, and sharpen product-market fit.
* Go-to-market alignment. Collaborate with product marketing, sales, and solutions teams to translate capabilities into compelling positioning, pricing and packaging, and enablement materials.
* Daily requirements. Drive day-to-day requirements definition and backlog refinement with engineering — writing clear user stories, acceptance criteria, and sprint priorities that keep delivery moving without sacrificing product quality.
* Competitive intelligence. Track the digital risk protection landscape — vendors, data sources, regulatory trends around dark web data and brand protection — and incorporate findings into roadmap decisions.
* Outcome measurement. Define and track KPIs tied to human risk reduction, domain threat coverage, and credential exposure response rates; use data to drive prioritization.

What You Bring
  
We're looking for candidates who understand how human behaviour, external digital exposure, and underground data markets combine to create risk — and who have the product craft to build platform capabilities that address it.
  
Required
  

* 5+ years of product management experience, with a track record of shipping complex B2B platform products.
* Domain expertise across at least two of the three areas in this portfolio: security awareness training / human risk management, domain protection / brand intelligence, or dark web monitoring / digital risk protection.
* Familiarity with the dark web data ecosystem — how credential markets, leak forums, and underground channels work, and how commercial intelligence is collected, enriched, and actioned.
* Understanding of domain threat vectors: typosquatting, lookalike domains, phishing infrastructure, and takedown processes.
* Experience working within an MSSP or MDR environment, or building products for one — you understand the service delivery model and its constraints.
* Demonstrated ability to work cross-functionally and drive alignment without authority.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; comfortable presenting to executives and customers.

Nice to Have
  

* Experience with digital risk protection (DRP) platforms such as Recorded Future Brand Intelligence, ZeroFox, Flashpoint, or similar.
* Background in OSINT, social engineering, or phishing campaign design — understanding the attacker's perspective on human and digital risk.
* Familiarity with regulatory and compliance considerations around dark web data collection and use (GDPR, data residency, etc.).
* Experience building or scaling SAT programs, including familiarity with platforms such as KnowBe4, Proofpoint Security Awareness, or Cofense.
* Alumni of elite IDF intelligence, signals, or psychological operations units — analytical tradecraft, source evaluation, and an understanding of how information and identity are weaponized are directly applicable to this role.
* Familiarity with the Israeli and Middle Eastern threat landscape as it relates to brand impersonation, hacktivism, and credential theft campaigns.

Working at eSentire — Tel Aviv
  
We have built this role with the Israeli work environment in mind. A few things worth knowing:
  

* Direct culture, welcome here. Israeli professional culture is known for directness, intellectual challenge, and flat hierarchies. We value this. Debate ideas openly, push back on decisions, and expect the same in return.
* Reserve duty (Miluim). We fully support employees with IDF reserve duty obligations. We understand miluim is a civic responsibility and will work with you to manage scheduling without impact to your standing or compensation.
* Holiday calendar. Our Tel Aviv team observes the Israeli public holiday calendar, including Rosh Hashanah, Yom Kippur, Sukkot, Passover, and Independence Day. We plan around these, not over them.
* Work week. We align to the standard Israeli tech work week (Sunday through Thursday), with flexibility built in for cross-timezone collaboration with North American counterparts.
* Time zone collaboration. Core overlap with eSentire's Canadian and US teams is typically mid-morning Israel time (late morning EST). We keep synchronous demands reasonable and document decisions thoroughly for async follow-up.
* Language. English is the working language for cross-functional collaboration. Internal team communication may be in Hebrew.

title: Senior Product Quality Manager
description:
Join NVIDIA's outstanding team and contribute to our legacy of innovation in the Senior Product Quality role! At NVIDIA, we are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of pioneering technology. The Senior Product Quality Engineer will provide leadership and management for the Networking system product quality within the organization. Establish, maintain, and optimize an effective quality management methods and target to achieve high quality performance.

As part of our team, you will work on networking IC products and ensure their readiness for production stage. Leading and mentoring root cause analysis for issues related to design, manufacturing or customers. Enhance and improve products performance by proactive risk assessment and other prevention methods. This is an outstanding opportunity to be part of a company that is crafting the future of AI and computing.

**What You'll Be Doing**
------------------------

* Integrated Circuits (IC) quality manager will coordinate and lead the quality function and sustain the quality philosophy for the organization.
* Establish, maintain and optimize an effective quality management system.
* Build and implement a quality plan to achieve the levels of quality established through organizational goals, customer expectations, and related partners.
* Improve products by working towards problem-solving tools, prevention methods, quality-at-the-source and continual improvement techniques.
* Maintain and improve product build development, verification and validation processes, to allow high quality of interconnects and systems products throughout the entire product life cycle.

**What We Need to See**
-----------------------

* Bachelor’s degree or master’s degree or equivalent experience in electrical engineering or material science. Other technical degrees will be considered
* Experience: 5+ years preferred in leadership and manufacturing
* Knowledge in semiconductor design and process
* Strong interpersonal and project management skills
* Strong problem-solving skills and analytical ability, processes oriented

**Ways to Stand Out from the Crowd**
------------------------------------

* Integrator experience in the semiconductor industry
* Experience in Silicon Photonics develop and manufacturing
* Leadership capabilities

title: מזכירה ללשכת חבר הנהלה
description:
מתן תמיכה אדמיניסטרטיבית שוטפת ללשכה, הכוללת ניהול יומנים ותיאום פגישות וישיבות, ריכוז והכנת חומרים לישיבות ולוועדות, הפצת דוחות ומסמכים, ועדכון שוטף של מערכות תומכות לניהול פעילות הלשכה. בנוסף, אחריות על הזמנת ציוד, ביצוע בקרות ועדכוני נוכחות, סיוע בהכנת מסמכים וביצוע משימות אדמיניסטרטיביות מגוונות בהתאם לצורכי הארגון. 1. השכלה אקדמית- תואר ראשון חובה (מועמדויות חריגות ללא תואר יישקלו באופן פרטני).
  
  
2. ניסיון אדמיניסטרטיבי- ניסיון בניהול לשכה של מנהל בכיר בארגון גדול – יתרון משמעותי. 3.שליטה במערכות מחשב- ניסיון בעבודה עם יישומי Office, בדגש על Excel ו-Word, וכן ניסיון במערכות לניהול משימות. 4.שפות ותקשורת- אנגלית ברמה גבוהה (דיבור, קריאה וכתיבה) ויכולת עבודה שוטפת מול ממשקים ודרגים ניהוליים בכירים.
  
  
5.יכולות אישיות- יכולת עבודה בסביבה מרובת משימות ותעדופים, מעקב אחר ביצוע משימות, לצד שירותיות, אסרטיביות, אחריות, סדר, דיוק, אמינות ודיסקרטיות.

title: ממונה תחום שירות למטה בתל אביב
description:

title: Backend Engineer
description:
**About Sweet Security**

Sweet Security is one of the fastest-growing companies in cloud and AI security, backed by top-tier investors and trusted by leading global enterprises. This is a chance to join at a pivotal moment—where strong product-market fit, real customer momentum, and a bold vision for the AI era are already in motion. The team combines deep technical expertise with a culture of ownership, speed, and high standards, giving you the opportunity to make a real impact, shape the category, and grow alongside a company that's quickly becoming a defining player in modern security.

With $120M in funding, Sweet Security is building the next generation of runtime cloud and AI security.

**Job Description**

Sweet Security is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to help design and scale the core systems behind our cloud-native detection and response platform. You'll play a central role in building backend services, managing cloud environments, and ensuring high performance and reliability. If you're passionate about clean architecture, efficient code, and working on high-impact cloud security products, this role is for you.

**Job requirements**

* 5+ years of experience as a Backend Developer with proficiency in TypeScript.  
  In-depth understanding of cloud environments and their inner workings.
* Experience with databases and message queues, especially Kafka.
* Ability to design and develop scalable backend systems.
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
* Ability to adapt quickly to new challenges and collaborate effectively in a team environment.

**Job responsibilities**

* Develop and maintain backend solutions using TypeScript.
* Optimize and integrate cloud environments for scalable operations.
* Manage databases and message queues like Kafka for efficient data handling.
* Troubleshoot and resolve backend issues to ensure system stability.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code.

**Advantages**

* Background in DevOps and cloud infrastructure.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools.

**Sweet Security** is an equal opportunity employer and is proud to be part of a diverse, multicultural world. We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where every employee has equal opportunities to grow and succeed. We believe that diversity is a key driver of success, and we encourage curiosity, innovation, and the integration of diverse talents across our global teams. All candidates are considered based on their qualifications, experience, and professional fit. We are committed to providing equal opportunities regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.  
At Sweet Security, we see diversity and inclusion as core values, and we actively work to foster a respectful, equitable, and empowering environment for all our employees, customers, and partners.

title: Automation & Embedded Engineer
description:
**Power the Future with us!**

**At SolarEdge (NASDAQ: SEDG), we're a global leader in smart energy technology, with over 3,000 employees, offices in 34 countries, and millions of installations worldwide.**

**Our innovative solutions include solar inverters, battery storage, backup systems, EV charging, and AI-based energy management. We're committed to making clean, green energy the primary power source for homes, businesses, and beyond.**

**With the growing demand for electricity, the need for smart, clean energy sources is constantly rising. SolarEdge offers amazing opportunities to develop your skills in a multidisciplinary environment, covering everything from research and development to production and customer supply. Work with talented colleagues, tackle exciting challenges, and help create a sustainable future in an industry that's always evolving and innovating. Join us and be part of a company that values creativity, agility, and impactful work.**

We’re looking for a passionate engineer who loves both Python and C, and is eager to develop automation tools for real-time embedded system

**What You’ll Be Doing:**

* Develop Python-based automation tools to test real-time embedded systems
* Define and implement test processes and flows using Python
* Design and simulate test circuits using simulation tools
* Read and deeply understand complex embedded systems written in C
* Opportunity to grow into Embedded software development over time

  
Requirements:
  

* Excellent knowledge of Python – experience with Pytest is an advantage
* Solid experience with Embedded C development, especially bare-metal
* BS.c in Electrical Engineering from a recognized academic institution
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Proficiency with Git – experience with CI/CD tools is an advantage
* Experience with power systems Engineering is a big advantage
* **Hands-on experience with circuit simulation tools such as PSpice, Simulink, or similar – considered a strong advantage**

**Soft Skills:**

* High motivation and initiative in tackling challenges
* Strong desire to learn and grow professionally
* Genuine passion for both Python and Embedded C
* Attention to detail and a proactive, “can-do” mindset

**SolarEdge recognizes its talented and diverse workforce as a key competitive advantage. Our business success is a reflection of the quality and skill of our people.**

**SolarEdge is committed to seeking out and retaining the finest human talent to ensure top business growth and performance.**

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
**Oak & Luna** is searching for a **Senior Graphic Designer** to join our team and design all site and marketing-related materials, including site banners, newsletters, ads, and social content. This isn't a production role. We're looking for someone with strong aesthetic intuition who can both conceive and execute, a designer who brings ideas to the table, not just deliverables.

**About us:**

Oak & Luna is a fast-growing, D2C personalized jewelry brand. We design pieces that carry meaning, and we obsess over every touchpoint - from the product to the pixel.

Our brand is built on taste, intimacy, and craft, and we hold our creative work to that same high standard.

This is a full-time position from our offices in Tel Aviv.

***\*\*Please send both CV and portfolio\*\****

  
Requirements:  
  

**Must-Haves:**

* **5+ years of experience** in graphic design with a portfolio demonstrating exceptional visual taste.
* Proven experience in digital design (web, social, email) and **art-directing photoshoots**.
* Mastery of **Adobe Creative Suite** and **Figma**.
* Active experience using AI design tools effectively.
* Fluent in **Hebrew and English** (written and verbal).

  
Responsibilities:  
  

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Brand Direction:** Evolve our visual language (color, typography, layouts) and maintain strict brand guidelines across web, email, and social.
* **Campaigns & Launches:** Lead visual concepts for product launches and seasonal campaigns from mood boards to final assets.
* **Art Direction:** Plan and art-direct photoshoots (styling, lighting, props) and brief photographers, stylists, and models.
* **Digital Design:** Design homepage banners, landing pages, paid/organic social assets, and email marketing newsletters.
* **AI Innovation:** Utilize AI tools (Midjourney, Firefly) for rapid concept exploration and mood boarding while maintaining high taste standards.

  
Advantages:  
  

**Strong Advantages:**

* Background in fashion, beauty, lifestyle, or premium D2C brands.
* UI/UX experience (responsive layouts and flows).
* Experience with Klaviyo, Canva, or managing external production vendors.

  
Division:
  
Line Of Business

title: Senior Researcher
description:
**About Cellebrite**

**﻿**

Cellebrite’s (Nasdaq: CLBT) mission is to enable its customers to protect and save lives, accelerate justice, and preserve privacy in communities around the world. Cellebrite is a global leader in Digital Intelligence solutions for the public and private sectors, empowering organizations to master the complexities of legally sanctioned digital investigations by streamlining intelligence processes. Trusted by thousands of leading agencies and companies globally, Cellebrite’s Digital Intelligence platform and solutions transform how customers collect, review, analyze, and manage investigative digital data in legally sanctioned investigations.

**What is your mission?**

**﻿**

The Applications Research Team within our elite Forensic Research Group is looking for a brilliant Researcher to drive the future of digital forensics.

In this role, you won't just look at data—you will decode the hidden digital footprints left behind by the world’s most widely used software.

Our team specializes in the deep-dive analysis, reverse engineering, and decoding of complex 3rd-party applications across mobile platforms. Your mission will be to tear down binary formats, dissect custom encryption protocols, and reconstruct application data from the ground up. If you look at an encrypted database or an undocumented binary format and see a puzzle that must be solved, this is where you belong.

**What you will love about your mission:**

Bleeding-Edge Tech Stack: Break open complex, obfuscated 3rd-party applications using advanced static and dynamic analysis.

Next-Gen AI Workflow: You will work in a highly modernized research environment, leveraging AI agents, LLMs, and custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations (like IDA and JADX MCPs) to supercharge your reverse engineering and accelerate discovery.

Impactful Coding: Translate your research breakthroughs directly into high-quality production code (primarily C#) that will be deployed globally to solve real-world cases.

Continuous Innovation: Move fast between hunting for hidden application artifacts, reverse-engineering proprietary file formats, and building intelligent automation tools.

  
Requirements:  
  
  

**The superpowers we are looking for:**

The Foundation: Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent experience from an elite IDF tech unit (e.g., 8200, 81, Matzpen).

The Experience: 3+ years of proven experience in security research, reverse engineering, or digital forensics.

The RE Toolkit: Hands-on experience with static and dynamic reverse engineering tools—if IDA Pro, JADX, Frida, and Ghidra are your bread and butter, you’ll fit right in.

The Code: Strong programming skills, with a focus on C#

The AI Mindset: Familiarity with or strong interest in integrating LLMs, agentic workflows, and AI tools into your daily research and coding pipelines.

The Drive: An unstoppable curiosity and passion for solving highly complex puzzles.

**Advantages that will make you stand out:**

Experience with mobile application security, sandbox bypassing, or root/jailbreak detection.

Deep understanding of internal database structures (SQLite, Realm, etc.).

Familiarity with cryptographic concepts and custom protocol analysis.

  
Office Location:
  
Petah Tikva

title: אחראי.ת איכות ורגולציה לחברה המפתחת מוצרי קוסמטיקה
description:
לחברה יצרנית בתחום הקוסמטיקה, הפועלת בשוק המקומי ובשווקים בינלאומיים. לצורך הרחבת פעילות הייצוא ופיתוח מוצרים חדשים, דרוש.ה מנהל.ת איכות מנוסה, אשר יהיה.תהיה אחראי.ת על ניהול מערכת האיכות, עמידה בדרישות GMP ותמיכה בתהליכים רגולטוריים. תחומי אחריות: מערכת איכות ו-GMP ניהול, תחזוקה ושיפור מתמיד של מערכת האיכות בהתאם לתקן ISO 22716 (Cosmetic GMP). כתיבה, הטמעה ועדכון של נהלים (SOP), הוראות עבודה וטפסי איכות.
  
  
פיקוח על יישום דרישות GMP בכל מחלקות החברה, לרבות ייצור, מחסן ומעבדה. ניהול חריגות, אי-התאמות ותהליכי בקרת שינויים (Change Control). אבטחת איכות ותמיכה בייצור בקרה ואישור של מסמכי ייצור ורשומות אצווה. טיפול, חקירה וניתוח של אי-התאמות ותלונות לקוחות.
  
  
יישום ומעקב אחר פעולות מתקנות ומונעות (CAPA). השתתפות בתהליכי שחרור מוצרים והבטחת עמידתם בדרישות האיכות. ניהול איכות ספקים הערכה והסמכה של ספקי חומרי גלם, חומרי אריזה ושירותים. ביצוע מבדקי ספקים ומעקב אחר ביצועיהם.
  
  
פיקוח על תהליכי בקרת איכות של חומרי גלם וחומרי אריזה נכנסים. מבדקים והסמכות תכנון וביצוע מבדקים פנימיים בהתאם לדרישות GMP. הכנת החברה למבדקי לקוחות, גופי הסמכה ורשויות רגולטוריות. תמיכה בתהליכי הסמכה ועמידה בתקני איכות.
  
  
הכנה ותחזוקה של מסמכים הנדרשים לרישום מוצרי קוסמטיקה בשווקי ייצוא. ריכוז והכנת תיקי מוצר (PIF), דוחות CPSR, גיליונות בטיחות (MSDS), רשימות INCI, מפרטים טכניים ומסמכים רגולטוריים נוספים. תואר ראשון בכימיה, ביוטכנולוגיה, רוקחות, הנדסת איכות או תחום רלוונטי אחר חובה ניסיון בתחום אבטחת האיכות בתעשיית הקוסמטיקה /הפארמה /המזון-חובה ניסיון מעשי בעבודה לפי תקן ISO 22716 (Cosmetic GMP). ניסיון בכתיבה והטמעה של נהלים ומערכות איכות.
  
  
ניסיון בהיערכות למבדקים ובניהולם. היכרות עם דרישות רגולטוריות בתחום הקוסמטיקה באירופה ובשווקי ייצוא. אנגלית ברמה גבוהה (קריאה, כתיבה ודיבור). יתרון: ניסיון ברישום מוצרי קוסמטיקה באיחוד האירופי ובשווקים בינלאומיים נוספים.
  
  
הסמכת עורך/ת מבדקים פנימיים ISO 22716 ו/או ISO 9001. ניסיון בעבודה עם ייצור עבור מותגים פרטיים (Private Label).

title: ראש/ת תחום חוג ידידי האוניברסיטה הפתוחה
description:
* תיאור התפקיד:האוניברסיטה הפתוחה מחפשת איש/אשת מקצוע בכיר/ה עם תשוקה אמיתית לפילנתרופיה ויכולת הובלה אסטרטגית להרחבה ופיתוח חוג ידידי האוניברסיטה. זוהי הזדמנות ייחודית לעצב מנוע תמיכה פילנתרופי משמעותי לאחד ממוסדות ההשכלה הגבוהה המובילים בישראל.
* תחומי אחריות עיקריים:
* פיתוח וביסוס חוג הידידים - בניית קהילת תומכים נאמנה מהיסוד.
* גיוס תורמים חדשים מהקהילה העסקית - יצירת קשרים וטיפוח מערכות יחסים לטווח ארוך.
* גיבוש אסטרטגיית תרומות ובניית תוכנית עבודה שנתית ורב-שנתית.
* ייצוג האוניברסיטה בפורומים עסקיים וחברתיים רלוונטיים.
* ניהול תהליכי גיוס מקצה לקצה - מאיתור תורמים פוטנציאליים ועד סגירת מחויבויות.
* כתיבת חומרים שיווקיים ופילנתרופיים ברמה גבוהה.

  
כפיפות ל:מנהלת פיתוח משאבים וקשרי חוץ
  

* כישורים נדרשים:ניסיון של 5 שנים לפחות בגיוס משאבים - חובה.
* ניסיון מוכח בגיוס תרומות בהיקפים משמעותיים מהסקטור העסקי והפרטי - חובה.
* עברית ברמה גבוהה מאוד - יכולת ניסוח וכתיבה מקצועית ומשכנעת.
* אנגלית טובה לצורך תקשורת עם תורמים ושותפים.
* יכולת בניית מערכות יחסים עם מנהלים בכירים ואנשי עסקים.
* חשיבה אסטרטגית לצד יכולת ביצוע ויוזמה עצמאית.
* ניסיון בתפקיד דומה במוסד אקדמי - יתרון.
* היכרות עם הקהילה העסקית בארץ ו/או הקהילות השונות בארץ ובחו"ל.
* כושר שכנוע ויכולת ניהול מו"מ.
* תואר אקדמי - חובה.

  

* העסקה בחוזה אישי.

- מועד תחילת עבודה - מיידי.

  
היקף משרה:מלאה
  
האוניברסיטה הפתוחה ב:רעננה
  

* רק פניות מתאימות תענינה

  

תינתן עדיפות בקבלה לעבודה למועמד/ת עם מוגבלות,
  
ובלבד שהוא/היא עומדים בדרישות התפקיד וכישוריהם דומים לכישורי מועמדים אחרים לתפקיד.

title: Software Developer Engineer in Test
description:
At Infinidat, a Lenovo company, we empower enterprises and service providers with cutting-edge storage platforms that redefine performance, reliability, and cyber resilience at scale.

As a **Software Engineer in Test** at INFINIDAT, you need to be innovative and passionate about quality. You will continuously design creative ways to break software and identify potential bugs.

In this role, you will be responsible for driving test development and infrastructure of an enterprise-grade, distributed storage system and build automated test suites.

  
Requirements:
  

* At least 7 years of experience in developing automated tests / automation tools of integrated SW/HW products
* Proven experience with Python or similar programming languages
* Proven experience with complex large-scale systems
* Excellent system diagnostic, troubleshooting and problem solving skills
* Excellent communication skills and team spirit
* Fast learner and independent
* Engineering degree or equivalent

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience with high-end IT systems and enterprise storage (SAN/NAS/Object) in particular
* Experience in Linux environment
* Networking and operating system internals knowledge
* Storage architecture and theory knowledge

**About Infinidat**

Infinidat’s enterprise storage portfolio provides global Fortune 500 enterprises and service providers with best-in-class solutions for primary storage, next-generation data protection, disaster recovery, business continuity, and cyber resilience. Infinidat’s acclaimed InfuzeOS is the one of the most flexible and complete enterprise software-defined storage architectures in the industry. We recently announced powerful enhancements, an extensive expansion, and the dynamic evolution of our award-winning G4 enterprise cyber and AI storage solutions!

Not only has Infinidat won 22 awards in the first half of 2025, but has also been a 7-time winner of the Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer Award for Primary Storage and we can go on, and on, and on!

  
Responsibilities:
  

* Develop complex test scenarios and tools using our massive infrastructure in Python
* Build and design infrastructures, tools and utilities
* Take an active role in product architecture and design decisions
* Participate in all stages of the development process - from design to delivery
* Design test plans for large and complex features in the product
* Investigate and solve hard-to-find problems such as race conditions, delicate timing issues and problems happening only at large scales or high performance
* Sign-off on official product releases: you'll have the authority to say "not good enough!"

title: מנהל/ת מוקד מכירות אשקלון
description:
מנהל/ת מוקד מכירות אשקלון

דינמיקהאשקלוןמשרה מלאה

  

**תיאור משרה**

לדינמיקה, רשת חנויות הסלולר המובילה בישראל מקבוצת סלקום, דרוש/ה מנהל/ת מוקד מכירות באשקלון, מתאים כמשרת הורים 08:30-16:00 ללא ימי שישי!  
ניהול שוטף של המוקד וצוותי המכירות.  
הנעת צוות מנהלים ועובדים לעמידה ביעדים.  
יצירת תכניות פעולה לשיפור ביצועים ומעקב שוטף אחר המכירות.  
עמידה ביעדי גיוס, תחלופת עובדים ופיתוח העובדים במוקד.  
פיתוח כיווני מכירה חדשים ושיפור תהליכים במוקד.  
שמירה על שביעות רצון גבוהה בקרב העובדים.  
אחריות על שגרות הניהול של המוקד: ניהול וביצוע תדריכים, ישיבות צוות, ישיבות מוקד, משובים, פ"ע.  
בניית תכניות עבודה חודשיות ושנתיות.

**דרישות התפקיד**

* ניסיון בניהול מנהלים.
* ניסיון של שנתיים לפחות בניהול צוות במוקד טלפוני בתחום הסלולר.
* ניסיון מוכח בהשגה ועמידה ביעדי מכירה.
* כישורי מכירה גבוהים ויכולת הנעה של צוות לעמידה ביעדים.
* סדר וארגון.
* יכולת עבודה תחת לחץ וריבוי משימות.
* ניסיון בניהול מוקד מכר.
* ניסיון משמעותי בייעול ושיפור תהליכים, קידום והובלת פרויקטים.

המשרה מיועדת לכל המינים והמגדרים.  
סלקום מעודדת ותומכת בהעסקת עובדים עם מוגבלויות.

title: מיישם ERP בסביבת SAP
description: קבוצת יעל מגייסת מיישם ERP בסביבת SAP לארגון ממשלתי גדול בירושלים לפרויקט ממשלתי משמעותי וארוך טווח דרוש/ה מיישם/ת SAP לוגיסטי (MM) מנוסה להשתלבות בצוות מקצועי ודינמי, העוסק ביישום ופיתוח פתרונות ליבה בסביבת ERP. התפקיד כולל עבודה בסביבה טכנולוגית מתקדמת, הובלת תהליכים עסקיים מקצה לקצה, התאמות מערכת, קסטומיזציה, כתיבת אפיונים פונקציונליים וטכניים ועבודה ישירה מול מגוון גורמים עסקיים וטכנולוגיים פנים וחוץ ארגוניים. תיאור התפקיד: ניתוח צרכי לקוח והתאמת פתרונות במודול SAP MM (לוגיסטיקה) ביצוע קסטומיזציה והתאמות במערכת SAP ERP (בסביבת ECC או S/4HANA) אפיון דרישות עסקיות וניתוח תהליכים לוגיסטיים (רכש, מלאי, קטלוג וכיו"ב) כתיבת אפיונים פונקציונליים וטכניים לפיתוחים, דוחות, טפסים ותוספות פונקציונליות מתן המלצות לגבי חלופות פונקציונליות במידה ולא נמצא פתרון מובנה בחבילה הובלת תהליכים עסקיים ועבודה מול גורמים פנים וחוץ ארגוניים הנחיית צוותי פיתוח בביצוע הפיתוחים ובדיקת התוצרים במערכת ליווי והנחיית מדריכי הטמעה בנוגע לתיעוד המקצועי הנדרש ניסיון של 5 שנים ומעלה ביישום SAP מודול MM – חובה ידע וניסיון מוכח ביישום פתרונות לוגיסטיים במערכת S/4HANA או ECC (ניהול רכש, ניהול קטלוג, ניהול מלאי וכיו"ב) – חובה ידע וניסיון בהובלת נושא ועבודה ישירה מול גורמים עסקיים פנים וחוץ ארגוניים, כולל ניתוח תהליכים עסקיים – חובה ידע וניסיון מעשי בכתיבת אפיונים פונקציונליים וטכניים עבור פיתוחים שונים (תוספות, טפסים, דוחות) – חובה יכולת עבודה עצמאית, שירותיות ברמה גבוהה, חשיבה יצירתית וראש גדול – חובה השכלה רלוונטית . ניסיון בעבודה עם ממשקי כספות ו-Web Services (WS) ניסיון וידע במודולים נוספים ב-SAP כגון: SD, FI, PM ניסיון באינטגרציה מול מודולים אחרים במערכת היכרות עם שפת ABAP, לרבות יכולת ביצוע Debug היכרות עם סביבת Web (עבודה מול צוותי UX/UI, אפיון ODATA, אפליקציות FIORI ו-Frontend) ניסיון בעבודה בתצורה אג'ילית (Agile), לרבות שגרות תקופתיות ושימוש בכלים תומכים (Jira, Azure וכדומה)

title: נציג/ת שירות לקוחות טלפוני ובכתב בנשר- שכר גבוה!!
description:
המוקדים המובילים, היציבים והמצליחים ביותר בארץ מתרחבים ומגייסים נציגי/ות שירות לקוחות בערוצים הטלפוניים והדיגיטליים בנשר! מחפשים/ות עבודה דינמית, מגוונת ומתגמלת בסביבה צעירה ותומכת, עם שכר מעולה, תנאים סוציאליים מלאים מהיום הראשון ואיזון מושלם בין העבודה לבית? הגעתם/ן למקום הנכון! במסגרת התפקיד – מענה רב-ערוצי לפניות: מתן מענה אדיב, סבלני ומקצועי לפניות נכנסות של לקוחות – הן בשיחות טלפוניות והן במענה כתוב (צ'אט, וואטסאפ ומיילים), פתרון בעיות וסיוע שוטף.
  
  
**– ניהול ותיעוד מידע:** ליווי פניות הלקוח מקצה לקצה, הזנת נתונים ועדכון פרטים במערכות המחשב וה-CRM. – עמידה ביעדים: שמירה על סטנדרט שירות גבוה, יעילות, מקצועיות ושביעות רצון הלקוחות בשני ערוצי התקשורת. שכר ותנאים – שכר שעתי מתגמל + תנאים סוציאליים מלאים מהיום הראשון! – היקף המשרה: עבודה במשמרות בוקר נוחות וקבועות (איזון מושלם בין בית לעבודה, מתאים מאוד גם להורים ולסטודנטים/ות!).
  
  
**– אופק מקצועי:** אפשרויות קידום מהירות למשרות אחמ"שות, חניכה, ניהול צוות ובקרה למתאימים/ות. – מיקום: נשר – תודעת שירות גבוהה, סבלנות, אמפתיה ויחסי אנוש מעולים – יכולת ביטוי מצוינת בעברית, כושר ניסוח גבוה בכתב, הקפדה על סימני פיסוק וללא שגיאות כתיב – שליטה טובה בסביבה ממוחשבת, יכולת עבודה עם מספר מערכות במקביל והקלדה מהירה. – אחריות, חריצות, הגעה בזמן ונכונות לעבודה יציבה לטווח ארוך. שליחת קורות חיים או הגשת מועמדות מהווה הסכמה לכך שחברת ג׳וב ספייס בע״מ תשמור ותשתמש בפרטיך, לרבות למטרת פנייה אליך בנוגע למשרות נוספות ודומות ולהעברת פרטיך למעסיקים פוטנציאליים בעתיד.
  
  
השימוש במידע ייעשה בהתאם למדיניות הפרטיות של החברה ובה גם מידע על זכויותיך. ניתן לסרב לשימוש עתידי כאמור במידע בשליחת ״תמחקו אותי״ או לפנות בכל שאלה או בקשה בנושא לכתובת privacy@jobspacepro.com.

title: ASIC Engineering Technical Leader
description:
Meet the Team
  
Join the Cisco Silicon One Front-End Design team, at the core of Cisco’s silicon development. Our engineers cover the full spectrum of chip design: definition, architecture, micro-architecture, RTL design, verification, signoff, and validation.
  
We leverage cutting-edge silicon technologies and methodologies to develop the largest-scale and most advanced devices, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.
  
Cisco Silicon One™ is transforming the industry with a unified, programmable architecture powering Cisco’s future routing portfolio and shaping the Internet for decades to come.
  
  
Your Impact
  
  

* Review micro-architecture specifications
* Supervise verification team members and provide professional guidance
* Implement Verification environment UVM based
* Collaborate with Design engineers to resolve bugs and achieve coverage closure
* Work with the firmware/Lab teams to verify chip flows
* Perform debug, root-cause analysis, and post-silicon validation in the lab

Minimum Qualifications
  
  

* B.Sc./M.Sc. in Electrical Engineering from a top university
* 10+ years of experience in the filed
* knowledge with UVM and functional verification methodologies

Preferred Qualifications
  
  

* Experience with MATLAB simulations and bit-exact modeling environments
* Familiarity with mixed-signal systems and environments
* Knowledge and hands-on experience with GLS

Why Cisco?
  
  
At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
  
Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
  
We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: עורך דין מסחרי, חברה תעשייתית גדולה, חובה ניסיון בהסכמים מסחריים
description:
עו"ד מסחרי חברה תעשייתית ציבורית התפקיד במחלקה המשפטית בכפיפות למנהל המחלקה ניהול משא ומתן, ניסוח ובחינה של הסכמים מסחריים מגוונים בהיקפים מהותיים (בעברית ובאנגלית), לרבות מול לקוחות, קבלנים, נותני שירות ויועצים שונים טיפול בנושאים הקשורים לממשל תאגידי ומזכירות חברה. טיפול במשימות ופרויקטים שונים של המחלקה המשפטית תמיכה ומתן יעוץ משפטי שוטף לכלל המחלקות בחברה עבודה שוטפת מול משרדי עו"ד חיצוניים בוגר/ת מוסד אקדמי מוביל. עורך/ת דין בעל/ת ניסיון של כ 4 שנים במחלקה מסחרית במשרד עורכי דין מוביל ו/או במחלקה משפטית בחברה עדיפות לחברה תעשייתית יצרנית בעל/ת ניסיון בהכנה של הסכמים מסחריים מגוונים, לרבות הסכמי ביצוע, אספקה, רכישה וחוזים מסחריים אחרים. ניסיון בשוק ההון ודיני ניירות ערך - יתרון.
  
  
ניסיון בהסכמי ביצוע קבלניים – יתרון. יכולת התמודדות טובה במצבי לחץ, עבודה בזמני עבודה קצרים וריבוי משימות

title: Deep Learning Tech Lead for Objects Modeling
description:
We are looking for a Deep Learning Tech Lead, who will be challenged by solving real-world problems using Computer Vision. Our mission in the algorithms department has a significant impact on autonomous vehicle technologies, external customers, and advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS). In this role, you will be responsible for the full cycle of deep learning R&D, including modeling new solutions and enhancing the performance of existing ones. Your responsibility will include design, implementation, guidance and mentoring for team members. You will leverage your extensive experience to lead multiple deep projects, and will be a key figure in leading successful execution and in finding creative solutions to difficult bottlenecks, across data, AI, engineering and product considerations.

**\*\* This role offers the flexibility to work part-time from our other sites, subject to seat availability.**

### **What will your job look like:**

* Lead the design, development, and implementation of accurate and robust AI algorithms for new projects
* Research the latest advancements in deep learning, multi-task learning, AI architectures, and apply them to enhance our algorithm
* Design, develop and implement deep learning algorithms to solve complex problems in computer vision
* Take ownership of deep learning projects: Design solutions, oversee execution, and collaborate with talented Algorithm developers
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and develop solutions

### **All you need is:**

* Advanced degree (M.Sc. or Ph.D) in Computer Vision, Deep Learning, or Machine Learning
* 3+ years of experience in developing deep learning algorithms
* Knowledge of C++
* Experience with deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, Keras, and PyTorch
* Hands-on experience working with LLMs (e.g., for data generation, augmentation, or labeling) - Advantage

Mobileye changes the way we drive, from preventing accidents to semi and fully autonomous vehicles. If you are an excellent, bright, hands-on person with a passion to make a difference come to lead the revolution!

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Product Manager, Threat Intelligence (Tel Aviv, Israel)
description:
Why eSentire
  
eSentire is the Authority in Managed Detection and Response, protecting the critical data and applications of 2000+ organizations in 80+ countries from known and unknown cyber threats. Our threat intelligence team operates on one of the most comprehensive and diverse telemetry sets in the MDR industry — giving this role access to real-world adversary data that shapes both the product and the broader security community.
  
About the Role
  
eSentire is looking for a Product Manager, Threat Intelligence to own the product vision and roadmap for our threat intelligence, threat hunting, and third-party risk management (TPRM) capabilities. This is a senior individual contributor role. You will set direction, define requirements, and drive outcomes across engineering, research, and go-to-market teams without direct people management responsibilities.
  
You will be the product authority on how eSentire operationalizes intelligence: from raw indicator ingestion and adversary tracking through to proactive hunting and supplier risk workflows — translating deep domain expertise into platform capabilities that keep our customers ahead of the threat.
  
Based in Tel Aviv, you will be embedded in one of the world's most concentrated threat intelligence talent ecosystems, collaborating closely with eSentire's global product, engineering, and threat research teams across North America.
  
What You'll Own
  

* Roadmap & vision. Define and own the multi-year product roadmap spanning threat intelligence, threat hunting, and TPRM — from data collection and enrichment through analyst workflows and customer-facing outputs.
* Intelligence platform. Drive development of eSentire's TI platform: indicator management, threat actor profiling, campaign tracking, and intelligence dissemination pipelines that feed our SOC and hunting teams.
* Threat hunting capabilities. Partner with our threat hunting practice to build the tooling and workflows that allow hunters to operate at scale — hypothesis management, hunt libraries, and findings integration into detection engineering.
* TPRM product. Own the product strategy for third-party risk management: vendor assessment workflows, continuous monitoring integrations, and risk scoring that helps customers manage supply chain exposure.
* Intelligence feeds & partnerships. Evaluate and inform decisions around commercial TI feed integrations, ISACs, and open-source intelligence sources; define how external intelligence gets normalized, scored, and acted upon.
* Customer & market insight. Conduct ongoing discovery with customers, prospects, and internal analysts to validate roadmap direction and surface unmet needs.
* Go-to-market alignment. Collaborate with product marketing, sales, and solutions teams to articulate the value of eSentire's intelligence capabilities in market, including pricing and packaging decisions.
* Daily requirements. Drive day-to-day requirements definition and backlog refinement with engineering — writing clear user stories, acceptance criteria, and sprint priorities that keep delivery moving without sacrificing product quality.
* Outcome measurement. Define KPIs around intelligence operationalization, hunt efficacy, and TPRM adoption; use data to drive prioritization.

What You Bring
  
We're looking for candidates who have operated inside the intelligence discipline — as an analyst, hunter, or practitioner — and have the product skills to turn that expertise into scalable platform capabilities.
  
Required
  

* 5+ years of product management experience, with a track record of shipping complex B2B platform or data products.
* Hands-on background in threat intelligence, threat hunting, or a closely adjacent discipline — you have produced intelligence, run hunts, or built the tooling that supports these workflows, and can hold a credible technical conversation with analysts and hunters.
* Working knowledge of the intelligence lifecycle: collection, processing, analysis, dissemination, and feedback. Familiarity with STIX/TAXII, MISP, or similar standards and platforms.
* Solid understanding of MITRE ATT&CK and how it is applied in detection engineering, hunting hypothesis generation, and adversary tracking.
* Familiarity with TPRM frameworks and supply chain risk concepts — you understand what customers are trying to achieve with vendor risk programs and what gaps existing tools leave.
* Experience working within an MSSP or MDR environment, or building products for one — you understand the service delivery model and its operational constraints.
* Demonstrated ability to work cross-functionally and drive alignment without authority.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; comfortable presenting to executives and customers.

Nice to Have
  

* Relevant certifications (GCTI, GCFE, GREM, or equivalent).
* Experience with threat intelligence platforms (TIPs) such as Recorded Future, Mandiant Advantage, ThreatConnect, or Anomali.
* Background in nation-state threat tracking or geopolitical intelligence analysis.
* Alumni of elite IDF intelligence, cyber, or signals units (e.g., Unit 8200, Unit 81, SIGINT directorate) — the analytical tradecraft, source evaluation skills, and operational security mindset developed in these roles map directly to this position.
* Familiarity with the Israeli threat landscape and regional adversary activity — a perspective that adds meaningful signal to eSentire's global intelligence picture.

Working at eSentire — Tel Aviv
  
We have built this role with the Israeli work environment in mind. A few things worth knowing:
  

* Direct culture, welcome here. Israeli professional culture is known for directness, intellectual challenge, and flat hierarchies. We value this. Debate ideas openly, push back on decisions, and expect the same in return.
* Reserve duty (Miluim). We fully support employees with IDF reserve duty obligations. We understand miluim is a civic responsibility and will work with you to manage scheduling without impact to your standing or compensation.
* Holiday calendar. Our Tel Aviv team observes the Israeli public holiday calendar, including Rosh Hashanah, Yom Kippur, Sukkot, Passover, and Independence Day. We plan around these, not over them.
* Work week. We align to the standard Israeli tech work week (Sunday through Thursday), with flexibility built in for cross-timezone collaboration with North American counterparts.
* Time zone collaboration. Core overlap with eSentire's Canadian and US teams is typically mid-morning Israel time (late morning EST). We keep synchronous demands reasonable and document decisions thoroughly for async follow-up.
* Language. English is the working language for cross-functional collaboration. Internal team communication may be in Hebrew.

title: Product Manager, Rare Disease
description:
Medison offers hope to patients suffering from rare and severe diseases by forming partnerships with emerging biotech companies to accelerate access to highly innovative therapies in international markets.

As the creator and leader of the global partnership category in the pharma industry, we strive to be Always Ahead and work relentlessly to bring therapy to patients in need, no matter where they live.

Our values are at the core of every action we take, and we are committed to going above and beyond to benefit the patients we serve.

We are a dynamic, fast-paced company operating in over 34 countries on 5 continents. We are looking for out-of-the-box thinkers, people who are passionate, caring, agile, and adaptive, to join us on our mission. If you are looking to make a difference in people's lives, we invite you to join us!

Responsible for the full management of the commercial aspects of the products, including strategy, budgeting, business planning, and performance tracking to ensure targets are met. Works closely with overseas partners and demonstrates an in-depth understanding of the field and key opinion leaders (KOLs).

The role combines working in the field and office, and cross country and overseas travel when necessary.

  
  
Requirements:  
  

**Required education and experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in natural or life sciences, Medicine, nursing, pharmaceutical, Dietitian.
* Master’s degree in business – advantage.
* 2-3 years of work experience as a product manager in an international company.
* Proficient in Microsoft Office
* Fluent in English

**Required qualification**

* Strong systematic and structured approach
* Quick learner with a high ability to adapt
* Able to work both independently and as part of a team
* Creative thinker with a problem-solving mindset
* Strong negotiation skills
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
* Ability to build and maintain strong relationships
* Highly adaptable and comfortable managing change
* Proven ability to lead, manage, and motivate employees
* Effective presentation skills in both English and Hebrew
* Strong work ethic and sense of accountability

**Internal and external work interfaces:**

* Internal interfaces – Marketing and headquarters departments, finances, HR, Operations, Logistics, Compliance, Regulatory Affairs, PV.
* External interfaces – HCPs, overseas partners and companies.

  
  
Responsibilities:
  

* Build strategic business marketing plan and execute it.
* Market analysis and working with physicians, specialists and KOL's.
* Work according to planned objectives, quality, and quantity.
* Prepare & execute a budget plan.
* Arrange creative activities within budget specifications.
* Manage designated territory, establish and maintain customers and HCPs in the area.
* Implement marketing policy and prepare marketing material (prepare presentations, flyers, manuals etc) and get the relevant regulatory approvals according to the supplier's requirement.
* Working together with a medical manager and presenting relevant marketing and clinical information to the team
* Create and manage field communication materials, including CLMs, brochures, key messages, and objection-handling tools for the sales team.
* Working in collaboration with colleagues and officials within the team and the company and with external service providers for the administrative handling of product needs
* Ability to independently handle scientific material, Prepare articles for team meetings.
* Ability to articulate for publicity.
* Troubleshoot, and objection handling.
* Work in accordance with the company code of ethics and guidelines laid down by the regulatory department.
* Business meetings with overseas partners, training sessions, conferences, etc
* Participation in conferences in Israel and abroad.
